The soldiers of Blue Water City all felt like there was something wrong. They all quickly ran back towards the city.

"Stop! I did not say that you could run away! Anyone who dares to move another step will be hit with the cannon!" Xu Que shouted through the megaphone.

Hearing this, they all stopped running. They were so terrified that their faces had all turned pale.

The three thousand soldiers of Snow City were filled with admiration.

"Hero Zhuge is so great!"

No one else could be as courageous as he was. They had only three thousand soldiers on their side, whilst the other side had fifty thousand.

But no one else could measure up to Xu Que's prowess and leadership. Just a few words from him could have thousands of soldiers quaking in their boots.

…

They all felt very proud to be part of this battle and to be led by Xu Que.

"Where is the governor? Has he fallen into the toilet? Tell all your soldiers to come out, I don't have time to play with you guys," Xu Que shouted. He wanted to take two more cities down by the end of the day, so he could return the ten helicopters and ten tanks.

Ding! "Congratulations to host 'Xu Que' for acting tough successfully. The reward is 420 Acting Tough Points!"

Ding! "Congratulations to host 'Xu Que' for acting tough successfully. The reward is 450 Acting Tough Points!"

…

System notifications continued to ring in his head.

Meanwhile, all of Blue Water City was in chaos.

Lu Wen's expression was visibly upset—he looked like a bomb that was ready to explode at any moment.

"Useless trash! They have only three thousand soldiers and a few cannons, but you're already frightened? Don't forget that we have fifty thousand soldiers," Lu Wen shouted. He was now wearing his armour. "Tell the soldiers to get prepared. I am going to teach that young man a lesson and show him how powerful we are!"

"Yes!" a guard answered before departing.

After a while, all the citizens left the city wall. There were now around forty thousand soldiers standing behind the city wall.

Meanwhile, all the bowmen still atop the city wall prepared to shoot.

Lu Wen stood atop the city wall and watched the battlefield for a while. Then he gave orders. "All Qian Hus, take your soldiers out and fight against them! You should attack him from all directions, since his cannon can only fire in one direction."

"Yes!"

The next minute, around three thousand Qian Hus rode out on their horses and left the city.

They formed around thirty small teams, each team with around a hundred people.

"How is everything going? I heard a huge explosion before," Buttface asked.

Xu Que did not have time to explain and said, "Go and carry the bombs to the city wall. When you're done with that, I will give you a tank to drive."

"Great!" Buttface got excited again.

Seeing the enemies marching towards him, Xu Que smiled.

"I knew you would do this! Soldiers in tanks and helicopters, fire now! Aim at them with the Rocket Gun! Adjust the direction of the God-Powered Cannon!"

The soldiers of the Snow City replied, "Yes!"

Bang! Bang! Bang!

The soldiers of Blue Water City were hit by multiple bombs. They could only shield themselves by using their True Core Strength. Their marching speed decreased as a consequence.

But all of a sudden, a bomb fell into the crowd from the sky and destroyed their formation.

Bang!

The God-Powered Cannon shot out another ray of golden light. The light flew across the crowd and killed everyone who was in the Original Infant Stage or below.

…

Seeing this, Lu Wen's expression grew darker and darker.

The war had just started, but he had already lost tens of thousands of soldiers…

He then said in a low voice, "Ask the soldiers to come back! Activate the City Protecting Array, I will personally destroy those cannons."

"Yes!" a guard answered and went to strike a bronze bell.

All of a sudden, the sound of the bell echoed through the area..

The soldiers heard the sound and shouted to each other. "We should immediately go back to the city!" Then they turned around and dashed back to the city.

"Hero Zhuge, we should take this opportunity to kill them!" a soldier said.

Xu Que sneered. "There is no need. We have put plenty of bombs beneath the city wall. Once they go back to the city, we shall kill them all! Aim your cannons at the city wall. Once the city wall falls apart, fire!"

chapters.title: Chapter 415: Bomb The Blue Water City
chapters.body:
Chapter 415: Bomb The Blue Water City

Chapter 415: Bomb The Blue Water City

Translator: Nyoi-Bo Studio Editor: Nyoi-Bo Studio

Hearing this, all the soldiers were stunned.

Hero Zhuge already knew that they would retreat? And that is why he asked Buttface to lay out the bombs beneath the city wall?

Now once the bombs explode, the city wall will crumble and many people will die. After that, we will definitely be able to take this city back.

Realizing this, the soldiers of Snow City all took a deep breath.

How great Hero Zhuge is! Everything is under his control…

In fact, Xu Que was simply acting according to his personal creed, which was 'simple and direct'.

"Have you all learned how to use the God-Powered Cannon? Remember, do not target the wrong person." Xu Que held up his megaphone and began to order everyone to get prepared.

Many soldiers jumped forward and shouted, "Hero Zhuge, I know how to operate it!"

"Me too."

"And me."

…

Soon there were plenty of soldiers manning the nine God-Powered Cannons.

Xu Que asked a soldier to man his own God Powered Cannon, before walking over to the area where the Rocket Guns were.

Compared with the God-Powered Cannon, the Rocket Gun was easier to use. One simply needed to fill the gun with explosives, and that was it.

Whilst the rest of the soldiers were learning how to use the Rocket Gun, Xu Que happily walked to the back of his army. Then he took out a switch.

He stared at Blue Water City, watching as their soldiers ran back to the city.

"Hurry up! We shall all be killed if we do not run quickly," they were yelling.

…

Everyone was running very fast, afraid of being the next person to be hit by a bomb.

In fact, Xu Que did not want to kill them all. After all, they were all soldiers of the Water Nation. If he killed them all, the Water Empress would not have enough soldiers to help her protect this country after the fighting was over.

"Why have you stopped?" Buttface asked.

"You will see. Now carry the last pile of bombs to the city wall," Xu Que said.

"No problem! No one has spotted me yet."

"Hurry up. There's no time for bullsh*t."

"Yes!" Buttface lifted up another pile of bombs that was heavier than his own body weight. He then dashed to the city wall.

Meanwhile, almost all the soldiers of Blue Water City had retreated back to the city.

The bowmen on the city wall were still looking closely at the battlefield. Suddenly, a bowman spotted Buttface and shouted, "Look, a dog is running towards us! There is something on its back."

"F*ck! I am a wolf! Not a dog!" Buttface cursed.

"How dare you! You are asking for trouble!"

"This monster must belong to that young man, I saw them talking with each other."

"He, a human, has a connection with a monster? I cannot believe it!"

"Out governor has begun to activate the City Protection Array. Soon every living creature outside these walls will be killed."

The soldiers on the city wall sneered.

Buttface was so angry that he kept barking at them.

Seeing this, Xu Que shouted with his megaphone, "Hurry up, you fool!"

"I have been seen! Do I still need to get inside?" Buttface was afraid and did not want to get inside.

Realizing that time was up and there were probably already enough bombs beneath the city wall, Xu Que then said, "Fine, don't get in then, stand where you are and do not move."

"What?" Buttface was stunned and realized something was wrong.

"Just do not move!" Xu Que said while playing with the switch in his hand.

"Are you kidding? I think you are plotting something."

"I am serious, do not move."

"No, you have to tell me what is really going on!"

"Wait a sec, haha, now I see where the ON button is!"

"What?!"

"Buttface, what do you want to say to the world?" Xu Que held up the switch in his hand and smiled.

Buttface finally realized that there was still a pile of bombs on his back. He began to wriggle, trying to shake off the cargo.

"F*ck! Wait a while."

"You are really rude!" Xu Que pressed the ON button.

Bang!

The bomb on the dog's back exploded, and Buttface was flung against the city wall. The next moment, the whole city wall began to tremble and crumble into pieces. The light screen on the city wall began to break…

Bang! Bang! Bang!

Soon, the city wall crumbled completely. The light screen turned into a ball of Qi and disappeared.

"Now, fire!" Xu Que waved his hands.

Bang!

Bang!

Bang!

The whole city wall was smothered in a rain of cannon fire.

Most of the soldiers on the city wall were dead.

"Now follow me," Xu Que shouted.

"Kill them all!" the soldiers of the Snow City shouted all together.

…

Lu Wen was about to activate the City Protecting Array. He suddenly realized that a ray of golden light was shooting towards him. He backed away and saw the soldiers around him getting killed by the light.

"Sh*t! Send the signal to Yun Luo City!" he shouted.

Suddenly, Lu Wen felt cold and turned around.

A sharp sword cut through his throat...

chapters.title: Chapter 416: We Will Not Take Anything
chapters.body:
Chapter 416: We Will Not Take Anything

Failed to download chapter body

chapters.title: Chapter 417: They Are Invincible; They Come From Hell!
chapters.body:
Chapter 417: They Are Invincible; They Come From Hell!

Chapter 417: They are Invincible; They Come From Hell!

Translator: Nyoi-Bo Studio Editor: Nyoi-Bo Studio

How long does it take to loot a governor's residences?

Well, the three thousand soldiers of Snow City needed only a few seconds…

Xu Que had said that they could take anything they wanted, apart from the needles and threads.

In just a few seconds, they had emptied the whole residence.

Xu Que was very satisfied, and the soldiers felt immensely happy as they had acquired many precious treasures. As for Xu Que, he had obtained a storage ring from Lu Wen.

Then he and the soldiers began to march to the teleportation device in the middle of the Blue Water City.

All ten cities were connected by a teleportation device, which saved Xu Que lots of time.

Xu Que activated the device and left Blue Water City with his soldiers.

The soldiers in Blue Water City were relieved, and felt a bit sorry for Yun Luo City.

Half an hour later, Xu Que arrived outside Yun Luo City. They did not spend any time setting up camps outside the city, and instead went directly towards it.

The soldiers of Snow City carefully laid out all their Rocket Guns and God-Powered Cannons, and continued operating their helicopters and tanks.

The patrollers of Yun Luo City were terrified.

…

Meanwhile, in Blue Water City, Buttface crawled out from the ruins of the city wall. He was still intact. Then he began to curse. "F*ck! How dare you! I will kill you!"

He ran through the city like a mad dog. After a while of not being able to find Xu Que, he asked a soldier and found out that Xu Que had already gone to Yun Luo City.

He was furious and stole some Spirit Stones from a soldier.

With the help of the Spirit Stones, he managed to activate the teleportation device and set out to Yun Luo City himself.

A few seconds later, a man in white and a few soldiers arrived at Blue Water City.

It was Situ's Second Uncle, Situ Wu.

He was worried that the soldiers would fail to persuade Xu Que to go back, so he had gone with them. He had also asked the soldiers to wear plain clothes in case they were seen by others.

As soon as they arrived at the Blue Water City, they were totally shocked.

The city wall had been turned to ruin, and the soldiers were all busy shifting the rubble away.

Situ Wu said, "Crap! Have they all been killed by Lu Wen?"

"I think there is a great chance that such a thing might have already happened. I heard that Lu Wen is very wicked and cruel, and it would be easy for him to kill just three thousand soldiers."

"I do not think so, maybe Hero Zhuge has managed to retreat."

"What are we going to do? Should we go back and report this to Situ?"

"Wait a moment!" Situ Wu waved his hands. He spoke seriously, "No one can recognize us right now. We'd better ask someone to see what has happened. Maybe Hero Zhuge is just being imprisoned somewhere."

"Right, we'd better ask some locals," a soldier agreed.

A soldier of Blue Water City walked past them. Situ Wu stopped him and asked politely, "It is our first time coming here, would you mind telling me what has happened here?"

The soldier said bitterly, "We just had a big war, it's lucky that you guys weren't here, otherwise you might have been injured. Those people are really powerful!"

"What?"

Situ Wu and the soldiers of Snow City were stunned.

What does he mean?

They are really powerful? Is he referring to Hero Zhuge and his soldiers?

The soldier then said, "You'd better get inside, we have to rebuild the city wall in five days. Otherwise General Zhuge will hang us on the city wall and touch our penises…"

Then he sighed and left…

Situ Wu and the soldiers were stunned.

General Zhuge? He calls Hero Zhuge General Zhuge?

Why is he saying that? Hasn't Zhuge lost?

Then they stopped another soldier and asked him again.

After finding out what had transpired, they were amazed.

In one hour…

They took this city back in one hour and killed Lu Wen?

And now they are heading to Yun Luo City?

My goodness! What on earth does he want to do? How has he managed to do all this?

After a while, Situ Wu finally collected himself and said: "Xiao Wu, go back to Snow City and report this to Situ. I will go to Yun Luo City and to see what is happening there. We are witnessing the birth of a General who is going to be remembered for all eternity. Hero Zhuge is really powerful!"

"Yes!" Xiao Wu powered up the teleportation device and went back.

Meanwhile, Situ Wu and the rest of the soldiers used the teleportation device to head towards Yun Luo City.

When they arrived at Yun Luo City, they were shocked by what they saw.

Yun Luo City was in ruins, just like the Blue Water City…

Still, they could not see Xu Que or the soldiers of Snow City. They could only see some Yun Luo City soldiers carrying away the rubble and rebuilding the city wall.

"This... this is unbelievable!" a soldier said.

Obviously, Xu Que had taken back Yun Luo City in less than an hour!

"I need to talk with one of the locals," Situ Wu said. He still could not believe what he was seeing.

A soldier of the Yun Luo City cried and described the army of Snow City as if it had been an army of Devils, with Xu Que as their leader.

He called them invincible, like an army from hell. Then he told Situ Wu that they were heading to Shen Hai City.

A few soldiers of Yun Luo City looked into the distance and stood in silent tribute for Shen Hai City.

...

chapters.title: Chapter 418: Miracles Can Happen More Than Once!
chapters.body:
Chapter 418: Miracles Can Happen More Than Once!

Chapter 418: Miracles Can Happen More Than Once!

Translator: Nyoi-Bo Studio Editor: Nyoi-Bo Studio

It was snowing at Snow City.

The whole city was covered by thick snow. It was very quiet in the residence of the governor.

Situ stood next to the attic window. She was holding a military book and watching the citizens outside milling on the street.

She looked a bit worried. She was concerned about Xu Que and the three thousand soldiers.

She knew that even if they failed to take back Blue Water City, Xu Que would still be fine. But her soldiers were not as powerful…

I doubt that many of them can come back alive…

She sighed, thinking that she should not have agreed to send them out with Xu Que in the first place.

Taking a city back in one day is just impossible!

Xiao Wu finally came back and dashed right into the house.

Seeing him, Situ had a feeling that something bad had happened.

Why has he came back alone? Where is Second Uncle? Where is Hero Zhuge? Where are the rest of the soldiers?

She dropped the book onto the ground.

She was afraid that Xiao Wu was bringing bad news.

Xiao Wu saw Situ and exclaimed: "General Situ, I have something to report!"

Situ took a deep breath and steeled herself to hear what Xiao Wu was going to say.

"You may speak now!"

Xiao Wu said excitedly, "Hero Zhuge has taken Blue Water City back, now he is heading to Yun Luo City!"

"What?"

Situ was shocked.

Hero Zhuge has taken back Blue Water City and is heading to Yun Luo City? This is not true. He only left around two hours ago, how can this be possible?

"General Situ, this is true. Lu Wen has been killed by Hero Zhuge and his thirty thousand soldiers all surrendered. No one on our side has been killed yet. This is really a miracle!" Xiao Wu said with excitement, as if he had witnessed the battle himself.

He killed Lu Wen… and no one on our side has died?

I cannot believe my ears…

Right at that moment, another soldier came back and ran toward the house.

As soon as he stepped into the house, he shouted, "I have something to report."

Situ thought that this time, something bad must have happened. She nodded. "You may speak now."

The soldier took a deep breath and said: "Hero Zhuge has taken Yun Luo City back. The governor has been killed and the remaining forty thousand soldiers have all surrendered. No one on our side has died and they are heading to Shen Hai City."

"What?!"

Situ was so surprised that her eyes were wide open.

Xiao Wu was the same.

Another one? And they are heading to Shen Hai City?

My goodness!

I must be dreaming!

Why are these cities falling so easily? God, how did this happen?

…

Meanwhile, at Shen Hai City, the war had ended. Xu Que stood on the collapsed city wall, looking like a General. All three thousand soldiers from Snow City were intact and in high spirits.

In less than three hours, they had taken back three cities—three of the most powerful cities amongst the ten cities of the Water Nation.

They had used the exact same tactics. Who said miracles could only happen once?

"Great Hero Zhuge!" the soldiers shouted.

Xu Que was carrying a stick on his back, and there was a dog hanging on the stick. It was Buttface.

"Let me down!" Buttface shouted.

Xu Que said, "Buttface, why did you come all the way here? And now you are hanging off the end of my stick and your butt has turned red! Hahaha!"

"F*ck! If it were not for your magic inscriptions, I would never have been caught by you. My intelligence level is higher than yours, why don't we do a quiz and see who is smarter!" Buttface shouted.

"Never mind! Yes, you do indeed have a bigger head but it is full of sh*t! Even a dung beetle would laugh at you"

"B*stard! You are talking nonsense!"

This stupid fool! He cannot even understand my joke, yet he is claiming that his intelligence level is higher than mine…

"Buttface, you are really cute!"

"Cute?" Buttface was stunned.

"Yes! You are dumb and cute!"

"F*ck! Come and fight against me!"

"Shut up! We should head to the next city before it is too late! You have to keep carrying the bombs, do you understand? Then I will let you drive a tank."

"Bulls*it! Do you think I will be deceived by you again?"

"You can also fly a helicopter."

"Hero Zhuge, where are the bombs? I can carry them now!"

chapters.title: Chapter 419: He Is Going To Give People A Great Show Tomorrow
chapters.body:
Chapter 419: He Is Going To Give People A Great Show Tomorrow

Chapter 419: He Is Going To Give People A Great Show Tomorrow

Translator: Nyoi-Bo Studio Editor: Nyoi-Bo Studio

It was dusk when Xu Que and his three thousand soldiers arrived at Yun Ling City.

With the help of his helicopters, tanks, Rocket Guns and God-Powered Cannons, the soldiers initiated their attack on the city.

Although the city wall was also protected by a Protection Array, it could not withstand the explosive force of the bombs and collapsed at last.

Xu Que then snuck into the city and killed the governor with the Killer God's Single Stroke. Seeing this, all the soldiers and officials of Yun Ling City surrendered.

None of them had intended to betray the Water Empress in the first place, so they quickly surrendered.

Then Xu Que and his soldiers looted the governor's residence, just as they had done before in the other cities.

The soldiers of Snow City knocked heavily at the doors to the residence and shouted, "Open the door. We have come to check your water meter. We will not take anything from you."

The door opened. The all swamped into the house and politely ransacked all the rooms. They then settled inside the house.

In one day, they had managed to take four cities back. This was really something that had never happened before. Since it was already dusk, Xu Que decided to let the soldiers have a rest before heading out to the next city the following day.

Buttface was very happy as Xu Que had given him a helicopter and a tank to use. He maneuvered them around the city over the night.

To Xu Que's surprise, Buttface knew how to operate the helicopter and the tank. Buttface said that he had learned from the other soldiers in the day.

How amazing. His intelligence level is so low, so how did he manage to learn this so quickly?

"Where on earth did you come from?" he asked Buttface.

Buttface was busy driving the tank and did not think too much. Then he said, "I am the offspring of the Ancient Magic Dragon. I have already lived six lifetimes, and in three more lifetimes, I will become a dragon."

Xu Que did not believe what he had said at all, but he felt like Buttface was not lying.

"Can it be true?" Xu Que murmured.

"Of course it is true. Because I have met some troubles, I turned into a wolf. In the next life, I will become a fierce tiger!"

"I simply cannot believe it!" Xu Que said.

Then he turned and went back to the city.

While he was heading back to the city, he suddenly recalled that he had once heard a story about the offspring of a dragon. The story was called "Nine Sons Of The Dragon".

In the book Huailu Tangji, the nine sons were Qiu Niu, Ya Zi, Chao Feng, Pu Lao, Suan Ni, Bi Xi, Bi An, Fu Xi, and Chi Wen.

Buttface had nothing in common with the nine sons, so Xu Que had never before thought to consider the notion that he might be offspring of the dragon.

In another book Sheng'an Waiji by the poet Yang Shen, different names were given for the fifth and ninth children of the dragon. The fifth was the taotie, which loved to eat and was often a symbol on food-related wares, and the ninth was the jiaotu, which looked like a conch or clam, did not like to be disturbed, and often featured as a symbol on front doors and doorsteps. Yang's list was Bi Xi, Chi Wen or Chao Feng, Pu Lao, Bi An, Taotie, Qiu Niu, Ya Zi, Suan Ni, and Jiaotu.

Taotie looked like a wolf and liked to eat. In the past, many people had thought that its head was beautiful and had engraved it on the surface of food and wine containers. In the legend, Taotie liked to eat very much, so the ancients would usually call someone who was greedy about food and money 'Taotie'.

In this regard, Buttface does resemble Taotie, but he just said he would become a tiger in his next life. Amongst the nine sons, Bi An looks similar to a tiger…

Thinking of this, Xu Que felt a bit nervous.

If he really is the offspring of the dragon, I have to beat him few more times before he turns into a dragon…

"Buttface…" Xu Que turned around and walked towards Buttface.

Buttface was crawling out a tank and was about to jump into a helicopter. He did not answer Xu Que.

Then Xu Que gave it him big slap!

"Ouch! Why did you hit me? Do you want to have a fight with me?" Buttface got very angry.

Xu Que said, "Shut up! You said you have lived six lifetimes. What are your incarnations?"

"I do not remember!" Buttface said reluctantly.

Xu Que knew that he had to be hiding something, since every time something important came up, he would always conceal what he knew.

For example, he must have known more about the Five Elements Mountain and had decided not to tell me everything. When he told me about the seal on the Five Elements Mountain and the Zudi of the black monkeys, he had pretended not to remember clearly… everything about him is just so strange. He was sealed in the stone wall of a Sword Catacomb, which is very similar to a seal for the Five Elements Mountain…

"Fine! If you don't want to tell me, then don't. But from tomorrow onwards, you will not be permitted to drive any helicopters or tanks!" then Xu Que left.

Buttface angrily replied, "I don't care! I can make my own helicopters and tanks!"

"Good! If you manage to make one helicopter or tank, I will treat you a meal at KFC!" Xu Que said.

Then he went right back to Yun Ling City.

Anyway, neither the business of the Five Elements Mountain or the origin of Buttface had anything to do with him. He was just a little curious, but now he was not able to get answers, he simply stopped.

In his dictionary, there were only three things—flirting with women, acting tough, and eating.

…

The next day, Xu Que headed to the fifth city along with the three thousand soldiers of Snow City.

Situ Wu was already back in the Snow City.

In the governor's residence, he and Situ were looking at each other silently.

They now knew that they could not stop Xu Que from reclaiming the Water Nation.

From time to time, soldiers would come in and report to them the latest news from the front line.

"Hero Zhuge has taken back Li Kong City!"

"Hero Zhuge has taken back Zhen Feng City!"

"Hero Zhuge has taken back Tian Yu City! The governors of the remaining three cities have abandoned their cities and run away... now, all ten lost cities have been taken back."

"Hero Zhuge said he is going to give people a great show at the Imperial City tomorrow."

chapters.title: Chapter 420: Something Is Not Right
chapters.body:
Chapter 420: Something Is Not Right

Chapter 420: Something Is Not Right

Translator: Nyoi-Bo Studio Editor: Nyoi-Bo Studio

Xu Que and his three thousand soldiers were now heading to the Imperial City.

They were all in very high spirits.

This army had won many battles in the past few days. They felt invincible!

They felt very confident with themselves and said that they would easily take the Imperial City back within two hours.

When Xu Que arrived at the city gates, he saw tens of thousands of soldiers standing upon the city wall and smiling down at him.

Xu Que raised a hand and his soldiers stopped.

"Why are they smiling? It's as if they are welcoming us!" Xu Que frowned.

Buttface said, "They want us to be less alert. When we approach them, they will definitely shoot us! We'd better return to Snow City and come back in a few days."

Xu Que gave him a slap on his head and shouted, "F*ck off! It must be because they are afraid of us and are about to surrender."

"You are too full of yourself!" Buttface said.

Seeing this, the soldiers all laughed.

They had been watching Xu Que and this dog quarrelling the whole way. They were amazed that they still had the energy to bicker with each other.

Meanwhile, a few soldiers of the Imperial City were riding towards them.

"Welcome! Hero Zhuge, we have been waiting for you for a long time. We have already taken control of the entire city!"

What?! The whole city is under their control? Are they on my side? No way, the Imperial City would not be that easy to take back.

"Shoot them!" Xu Que shouted.

A few Rocket Guns were carried over. The soldiers then targeted the approaching soldiers of the Imperial City.

Seeing this, the soldiers of the Imperial City stopped smiling and screamed, "Don't! Hero Zhuge, we are on your side."

"Nonsense! What proof have you got to prove that you are on our side?" Buttface said.

The soldiers hurriedly said, "Yesterday, we heard that the Ice Queen was injured and had fled. The Water Empress is about to come back. We have also heard that Hero Zhuge has taken back all the lost cities in two days, and we admire you so much. Then we killed the traitors in the city and took control of the city!"

"Huh? The Ice Queen was injured and has fled? Why haven't I heard of this?" Xu Que was surprised.

Back at the Holy Ground, he had only seen the message left by the Water Empress on the ground, and had not seen the Ice Queen. He knew that the Ice Queen had been at the Holy Ground and there was a high chance that she had disappeared somewhere with the Water Empress.

Everything just happens too fast!

"Hero Zhuge. The Princess Zi Xuan saw the Ice Queen running away herself. We were not able to take back the Imperial City without her," a soldier of the Imperial City said.

Zi Xuan? Haha, I almost forgot, she is the younger sister of the Water Empress.

"Where is she now? Tell her to come and see me or I will shoot you!"

Hearing this, the soldiers felt a bit reluctant.

A princess cannot come out like this, it is too informal! But they are really powerful… if we do not ask the princess to come out and see him, what happens if he really shoots us?

"Is she coming or not? If she does not come, I shall shoot you now! The army behind me can no longer wait to kill you all!" Xu Que shouted.

How shameless he is! He is calling his force of three thousand soldiers an army?! We have a hundred thousand soldiers and some leaders who are in the Infant Transformation Stage. Why should we act at his behest?!

Still, they had no option but to continue smiling at Xu Que.

"It's you!" a female voice spoke.

Xu Que looked up to the city wall and saw a young woman standing on the city wall.

"Zi Xuan!" Xu Que laughed and asked the soldiers to withdraw the Rocket Guns.

When the Ice Queen had first taken the Water Nation, she had simply imprisoned Zi Xuan in the palace.

But over the last two days, she had heard that all ten cities had been reclaimed by a young man. She had immediately guessed that the young man was Xu Que.

So when the Ice Queen had been injured, she had instantly sent someone out to assassinate the traitors in the city and take back the Water Nation. Today, having heard that Xu Que had come to the Imperial City, she had quickly come out to meet him.

When she called out 'Xu Que', everyone at present was confused.

She called him 'Xu Que'?

Then Xu Que proudly entered the city with his soldiers.

Compared with the other ancient cities, the Imperial City looked much grander. Thanks to the Water Empress, the economy was very good and all the citizens were living a happy and peaceful life. There were many cultivators carrying advanced magic weapons and walking on the street.

On the way to the palace, Zi Xuan was frowning. She did not say anything to Xu Que.

Xu Que thought that she was still holding grudge against him about the Flaming Sun Princess, so he did not say anything to her either. Instead he talked with a random soldier and asked him what had happened between the Ice Queen and the Water Empress.

"As I have been told by Princess Zi Xuan, one night when she was walking in the palace, she saw the Ice Queen coming out from the treasure vault. The Ice Queen looked very pale and there was blood on her collar. It was clear that she was badly injured. Then Princess Zi Xuan went to her and asked what had happened. The Ice Queen told her that she had been hit by the Water Empress," the soldier said.

Hearing this, Xu Que was stunned.

It seems that the Ice Queen failed to kill the Water Empress and was almost killed by her.

"Why she did not kill Princess Zi Xuan that night?" Xu Que asked.

"Actually, ever since the Ice Queen began taking over the Water Nation, she has not done anything bad. Everything is as it is was before. After she was injured, she just spoke with Princess Zi Xuan for a while and hurriedly left. Someone said that she had gone abroad."

Xu Que frowned.

Something is not right!

chapters.title: Chapter 421: The Bedroom Of The Water Empress
chapters.body:
Chapter 421: The Bedroom Of The Water Empress

Chapter 421: The Bedroom of the Water Empress

Translator: Nyoi-Bo Studio Editor: Nyoi-Bo Studio

Later, Xu Que and his three thousand soldiers settled down in the palace. They were looked after by the maids and eunuchs as if they were royals.

After all, they had taken back all the lost cities, so they deserved to be treated like this. When the Water Empress returned, they would surely receive rewards.

The soldiers of Snow City all felt very lucky that they had followed Xu Que.

At midnight, Xu Que sat in a yard, smoking.

Buttface was very curious about his cigarette and asked if he could have one from him. He took a small drag and almost choked to death. He lay on the ground and stared at Xu Que.

"You are really a freak. How can you act so comfortable smoking this sort of trash!"

"Buttface, shut up! I am thinking, do not disturb me!" Xu Que said impatiently. Then he fell into deep thought again.

Buttface asked, "Are you planning to take over the remaining four nations?"

"Why on earth would I want to attack the remaining four nations? I was thinking about what that soldier had said to me earlier. Don't you find it odd that the Ice Queen left just like that?" Xu Que frowned. Clearly, he still did not believe what he had been told.

The Ice Queen was injured by the Water Empress and then ran back to the palace. When she was seen by Zi Xuan, she told her what had happened and then simply left. I just find this too hard to believe.

The Ice Queen is such an ambitious woman, it is impossible that she would so easily give up the whole city.

"You are right. This indeed sounds very odd! She has been planning to take over the Water Nation for fifty years, she wouldn't abandon this city like that." Buttface nodded.

"I knew it. See? Even someone as stupid as you can agree that this is very odd. How can it be possible that no one else ever doubts this? I think we have been tricked!" Xu Que said.

Buttface nodded, then realized Xu Que was making fun of him. "Who said that I am stupid? It's typical for ordinary people to believe this hoax, but I am different, as I am very clever."

"Shut up! Whenever you open your mouth and start to talk, I just want to give you a slap!" Xu Que said, standing up.

Hearing this, Buttface shied away and shouted, "Seriously? What is wrong with you?"

"I'm just kidding. By the way, I think the Ice Queen is still in the palace, she must be hiding somewhere." Xu Que frowned.

"I agree with you." Buttface nodded.

"I think I will have to pay a visit to the Water Empress' bedroom!" Xu Que said rather seriously.

"What?! Why are you going to the Water Empress' bedroom?" Buttface was stunned. "You are not going to take this opportunity to f*ck someone in her bedroom, right?"

"Nonsense! I am not that sort of person. Now think, you idiot. There is only one place that is the safe in the entire palace, and that place is the Water Empress' bedroom. Apart from the Water Empress herself, no one would dare enter. So if the Ice Queen is still in the palace, she must be hiding there!" Xu Que said.

Buttface wanted to say something to contradict with him, but he felt his words made sense.

Then he sat on the ground and said, "You go then, I am going to sit here and absorb the energy of the moon!"

"B*stard! You are so lazy!" Xu Que cursed.

In fact, he had not intended to take Buttface with him in the first place.

In the blink of an eye, he left the yard.

The layout of the palace was not that complicated, and there were many ponds around. In certain places, the water element Qi rose up from the ground.

Due to this, the entire palace was shrouded by fog and had been like that for years. Once a normal person stepped into the palace, they would be bound to get lost.

For Xu Que, the fog was not a big deal. With the help of True Core Strength, he could see his surroundings clearly.

On his way to the Water Empress' bedroom, many maids, eunuchs and guards greeted him and called him 'General Zhuge', or 'General Xu."

In case people found out that he was heading to the Water Empress' bedroom, Xu Que pretended that he was just taking a walk after dinner.

He casually walked around, humming a tune. Some guards walked past him and looked at him as if he was a crazy person.

Xu Que shouted, "Don't give me that look, I was just humming! Do your work!"

After a while, he finally arrived at the Water Empress' bedroom. It was dark inside and there were a few soldiers patrolling outside.

He hid in a dark corner and use his God's Strength to search the bedroom, trying to find out if there was anyone inside.

But as soon as his God's Strength touched the bedroom, it bounced back.

"What?" Xu Que was surprised.

Ding. "Magic array detected. To break it, spend 500 Acting Tough Points. Yes or No?" The sound of the notification rang in his mind.

"No. Since it is blocked, I will check it out myself!" Xu Que said.

500 Acting Tough Points?! I'm not stupid.

Over the past two days, Xu Que had already spent over ten thousand Acting Tough Points. After doing some calculations, he found that he had only earned eight thousand points... but to please the Water Empress, he did not mind.

The next moment, he changed into some leaves and snuck into the bedroom.

As soon as he got in, he stopped to breathe and hid himself.

He looked around. He could smell a fragrant aroma, which reminded him exactly of the scent of the Water Empress' oft-used perfume.

When he was about to walk, a ray of light appeared, quickly turning into a big bowl that covered him. Then the bowl changed into an ice prison.

A woman slowly walked out, sneering. "You really are clever! Still, how dare you enter the Water Empress' bedroom?"

chapters.title: Chapter 422: The Ice Queen
chapters.body:
Chapter 422: The Ice Queen

Chapter 422: The Ice Queen

Translator: Nyoi-Bo Studio Editor: Nyoi-Bo Studio

Xu Que did not dodge, since he was not afraid of the magic inscriptions of the category of either water or ice. After all, he had come from Fire Country.

Still, he was stunned when he saw that young woman.

He had seen many beautiful women since coming to the Cultivation World, but the woman in front of him was amazingly charming.

Her skin was flawless. Her face was as beautiful as a blooming flower, her eyebrows were as black as the grass on a mountain in the early spring, and her eyes were as gentle as rippling water in fall.

Best of all, she had a pair of long, slim legs. Her breasts, her waist and her hip were just perfect! She looked very seductive.

Her personality was totally different to that of the Water Empress.

The Water Empress was mature and demure. Her body was also perfect, and no matter what she wore, her curves could always be easily seen. She was elegant, just like an angel from heaven.

Meanwhile, the woman in front of Xu Que looked as if she could be a member of the Asura—a class of divine beings in Buddhist mythology. With her beauty, she could easily seduce all the men in the world.

She was currently at Level 7 of the Infant Transformation Stage!

"Hello, beautiful. Are you the Ice Queen?" Xu Que smiled.

He was not stupid—he knew the woman in front of him was the Ice Queen. Besides, he could tell that she was injured and that the True Core Strength inside her body was in disorder.

Liu Jingning looked at Xu Que.

When she had been at the Snow Mountain, she had known how powerful Xu Que was. After finding out that he was one of the disciples of Duan Jiu De, she had grown more curious about him.

When she heard Xu Que call her 'beautiful', she smiled.

"Hero Zhuge, you are really something." Liu Jingning laughed, and she now looked more charming.

"Yes!"

Hearing this, Liu Jingning was stunned and then she laughed again. Her breasts moved up and down while she was laughing…

Xu Que stared at her breasts and started to enjoy it.

Liu Jingning knew that he was staring at her breasts, but she did not mind. She said, "Hero Zhuge, you are very humorous. In fact, I am very curious about your identity. Since you dare to come to Jiang Hong Yan's bedroom, I believe that you two must be getting along with each other very well."

Jiang Hong Yan?

This was the second time that he had heard the Water Empress called by her full name.

Before, he had never known that the surname of the Water Empress was 'Jiang'.

That surname had a long history.

It was noted in the Huaxia Mythology that the Yan Emperor had been born alongside the River Jiang, so he had taken on that surname. The Jiang Ziya in The Investiture of the Gods was the offspring of the Yan Emperor.

Xu Que was a bit surprised by her words. He then smiled: "Well, the relationship between the two of us is a bit complicated. Besides, you are now in her bedroom, which means that you two must be very close."

Liu Jingning sneered. "I am the Queen, so I would be her matriarch!"

"Anyway, why are you hiding here? Are you staying here until you recover or are you planning to occupy the Water Nation again?"

Liu Jingning shook her head and said, "The reason why I came all the way to the Water Nation is simply because I need to get a specific item. But now that I know I can never get it, what's the point of having this city back?"

"So you staying here until you recover?" Xu Que was still very doubtful.

Liu Jingning said gently, "I've also been waiting for you."

Xu Que laughed. "Ha, I see. Then let's hurry up and not waste any time. Take off your clothes."

Liu Jingning was very calm. She smiled. "I see. But this is normal, a young man of your age is always thirsty for sex. Unfortunately, I am not interested in a small guy like you!"

F*ck!

Xu Que was a bit unhappy. "You have not even seen my penis!"

Liu Jingning shook her head and said, "You are still too young. You are gifted, but your mind is not yet powerful, you are still trapped by human emotions and lust. Maybe after a few centuries, you will be as strong as us."

"Beautiful, I never thought that you would be so good at acting tough too!" Xu Que sneered.

If cultivation means that I should give up human's emotions and lust, I'd rather not continue with cultivation anymore. Anyway, I can upgrade by increasing my Acting Tough Points!

Liu Jingning smiled. She knew that Xu Que had not taken her words seriously, but she did not care.

"Let's get back to business. Firstly, I hid here to see if you could find me. Secondly, I want to personally ask you some questions."

"I'm sorry, but I don't want to answer any questions. Now leave the Water Nation and never come back, otherwise I will kill you."

He had gone to such great lengths to win the entire Water Nation back—the last thing he wanted was for the Ice Queen to continue causing trouble for him. Otherwise, all his efforts would have been futile.

Liu Jingning was a bit surprised. Just then, he had seemed like a humorous gentleman, but now he had become a cruel man.

"It seems that you have misunderstood me. But... you have to recognize that you have been imprisoned by me!" Liu Jingning laughed.

She was very confident that Xu Que could not break out, since even the Water Empress had failed to break out.

"Ha. I am imprisoned by you? When did this happen? Oh, you mean the ice cage? Hahaha, I did not even notice it!" Xu Que laughed.

Liu Jingning said, "I know you have powerful backup. I do not want to be your enemy. I just want to make one thing clear! If you answer my question, I will let you go! I promise!"

Suddenly, Xu Que hold up his hand. A ball of black fire appeared on his palm. It was the Eight Waste Destruction Flame!

The next moment, he hit the ice cage with his palm.

Bang!

The ice cage collapsed and began to melt. Soon, it became a thread of white smoke and vanished.

Seeing this, Liu Jingning was shocked and her eyes were wide open.

Xu Que walked up to her and smiled. "I wasn't listening. Would you mind saying that again?"

chapters.title: Chapter 423: The True Identity Of The Water Empress
chapters.body:
Chapter 423: The True Identity Of The Water Empress

Chapter 423: The True Identity of the Water Empress

Translator: Nyoi-Bo Studio Editor: Nyoi-Bo Studio

Liu Jingning was totally shocked.

He destroyed the magic inscriptions for my cage with just one hit! I cannot believe this.

She stared at Xu Que's palm and asked, "What is that fire?"

Xu Que looked at Liu Jingning and smiled: "I have said already that I do not want to answer any of your questions. Are you going to stay or leave? If you choose to leave, then leave! If you want to stay, then let's fight!"

"There is no need to be like this. I just want to ask you some questions which concern Jiang Hong Yan's safety. Are you sure you really don't want to answer any of them?" Liu Jingning did not want to fight with Xu Que, so she told him that the questions had a lot to do with the Water Empress' safety.

Hearing this, Xu Que frowned and said, "How?"

Liu Jingning then said, "You do not know who Jiang Hong Yan really is? It seems that she simply regards you as her inferior, not her helper!"

"What do you mean?" Xu Que asked.

"Nothing. Since she has not told you about this, that means she did not want to drag you into this mess. There is also no need for me to ask you!" Liu Jingning was a bit disappointed. She shook her head, about to leave.

"Wait!" Xu Que shouted. "Tell me everything you know."

Liu Jingning smiled and shook her head. "Although I do not get along with her now, when we were young, we were very good friends to each other. This is her business, and it should be up to her to tell this to others. It is not my place to tell you!"

"I asked you to leave and you did not leave. Now I will not let you go!" Xu Que sneered.

In fact, he already knew that there was something about the Water Empress that he did not know. Since the Ice Queen did not want to tell him, he though that perhaps he should just stop—after all, it was private.

But the Ice Queen had said that this had a lot to do with the Water Empress' safety, which meant that the Water Empress might have been in danger.

Liu Jingning was angry. She said in a low voice, "Young man! You really want to fight me? You are too full of yourself. If it were not for the powerful backup you have, I would already…"

"Ha, strange how I have no idea what this powerful backup is. I think it is you who are arrogant. Killing you would be a piece of cake for me."

Xu Que sneered.

In a moment, an eight-star sword appeared in his hand.

Liu Jingning suddenly recalled what Hong Yan had told him.

This young man killed the Old God of Killing and the late Emperor of Fire Country. Abroad, only the Holy Son, or the elite among the holy sons, can be as powerful as he is.

"Maybe I was wrong about the relationship between you and Hong Yan."

Liu Jingning mocked herself and looked at Xu Que.

"Young man, are you in love with Hong Yan? Is that why you are so concerned about her safety?"

"It's none of your business!" Xu Que replied.

Hearing this, Liu Jingning laughed. "You aren't joking. You know, we just regard you as someone who is younger than us. You cannot possibly be in love with her."

"Stop laughing!"

Xu Que waved his wrist and executed The Nine Grids Sword Art of Celestial Thunder. In the blink of an eye, the sword was against Liu Jingning's neck.

"I do not care how you two see me. Tell me, what happened to Hong Yan? Where is she?"

Liu Jingning was shocked when she saw the sword—she had not even noticed any of this happen.

She sneered. "Young man! Let me tell you, Jiang Hongyan is not someone you can love. First, she is a member of the Jiang family. Second, she is cursed. If you are really in love with her, I suggest you forget her soon."

Liu Jingning snapped her fingers, and the next minute, a coldness quickly filled Xu Que's body.

His arm felt numb and there was now a thin layer of ice on his arm. Meanwhile, he felt that his True Core Strength had been blocked somehow…

He sneered and began to activate the Mystical Fires inside him, trying to stop the coldness.

Liu Jingning smiled and snapped her fingers again. The space between them twisted and her body grew transparent. At last, she disappeared.

"Young man. It is not that easy to kill me. Remember Jiang Hong Yan is not in danger now, but she will be in danger soon! I suggest you forget her and never, ever have anything to do with her. Otherwise, no matter how gifted or powerful you are, you will lose your life for her!"

She was clearly using an advanced magic inscription.

Bang!

He managed to expel the coldness from his body. The ice on his arm fell into pieces.

He could not feel Liu Jingning's presence anymore. She had run away.

"F*ck! I was tricked!"

When his arm was still frozen, he could have still killed her if he wanted.

Although Liu Jingning was injured, she still managed to run away. How powerful that woman is.

The reason why he had not killed her was because he wanted to know the secret behind Hong Yan. But he had never thought that she would be able to use such an advanced magic inscription.

"Well, I should upgrade my own magic inscriptions now!"

chapters.title: Chapter 424: It'S Damn Cheap
chapters.body:
Chapter 424: It'S Damn Cheap

Chapter 424: It's Damn Cheap

Translator: Nyoi-Bo Studio Editor: Nyoi-Bo Studio

Xu Que was confused by what the Ice Queen had told him before disappearing.

The Water Empress is not in danger now, but she will be in danger in the future? The Ice Queen can predict the future?

Thinking, he shook his head.

Anyway, at least the Water Empress is not in danger now. I should just wait until she comes back, then I will ask her myself.

Now it is time for me to upgrade my magic inscriptions.

Recently, Xu Que's body had become much stronger as he had been practicing the Hell King's Prison Suppression Style, as well as techniques from the Killer Book, the Killer Sword and the Buddha's Fiery Lotus. Now no one of his stage would be able to defeat him, and he would be able to kill someone at a higher stage.

However, after being tricked by Liu Jingning, he realized that his current magic inscriptions should be upgraded.

"It seems that staying in the five nations can no longer really help me accumulate Acting Tough Points," Xu Que murmured and summoned the System.

On the screen, he pressed the 'Skill' button, and chose the Celestial Stage. With the Acting Tough Points he got, he could buy any magic inscription that he wanted.

In the Celestial Stage, most of the inscriptions were subsidiary ones that could not quickly kill an enemy.

Soon, he spotted a inscription he liked.

The Shadowmeld of Three Thousand Thunders.

It was a tactic of the Advanced Earth Rank in the Fight Break Spheres. In the Sphere of Immortals, it could be regarded as a high-grade celestial art.

After a while, the host would be able to create a thunder shadowmeld of their own. After fully mastering this tactic, the shadowmeld could become as strong as the host, and the host would be able to control it with his Soul Strength. As long as the host lived, the shadowmeld would not die. But the host would have to master the Three Thousand Volts Lightning first!

Price: 300 Acting Tough Points…

"This is nice. I will take this. But the Sky Rank is the highest rank the System has? Well, I just feel like I have overestimated this System," Xu Que said and bought this the Shadowmeld of Three Thousand Thunders.

After all, he had mastered many powerful magic inscriptions, but with these inscriptions, he would only be able to kill someone who was one level above him.

The System replied, "To buy magic inscriptions of a higher grade, you must upgrade the entire System. This will cost you twenty thousand Acting Tough Points."

"No, no, no, no. I will not upgrade the System!" Xu Que refused.

It was simply too expensive…

If I had not bought the Shadowmeld of Three Thousand Thunders, I would probably upgrade this System. Now that I might be able to have a shadowmeld of my own, in the future, I will just rely on my shadowmeld. If it loses, I will still be able to fight. And as long as I am alive, it would not die…

However, when he bought the Shadowmeld of Three Thousand Thunders, he found that his Skill Essence had almost been completely consumed. There were only around ten points left.

All these years, he had been stealing magic inscriptions from others' treasure vaults, and as soon as he had gotten them he would immediately let the System recycle them in order to obtain Skill Essence. With Skill Essence, he would upgrade other magic inscriptions, such as the Three Thousand Volts Lightning, the Flame Devouring Wave and the Six Corporeal Forms.

As for magic inscriptions such as the Troop (one of the Nine Secrets) and the Buddha's Fiery Lotus, the process of upgrading had not been completed yet, since these inscriptions belonged to the Sky Rank and would require more Skill Essence.

As for the Shadowmeld of Three Thousand Thunders, the higher his proficiency was, the stronger his shadowmeld would be. When the degree of his proficiency reached ten percent, the shadowmeld would become as powerful as its host.

Due to this, Xu Que needed to exchange for Skill Essence with a huge number of magic inscriptions. Only then would he able to use Skill Essence to upgrade the Shadowmeld of Three Thousand Thunders.

…

The next morning, he left the palace and headed to the center of the city. He set up a wood plate and wrote a few lines of writing on it: 'buying various kinds of magic inscriptions for a high price!'

Most of the cultivators and citizens in the Imperial City did not know about Xu Que, so not many people had showed much interest in him before. But after setting up this plate, people began to show interest.

"High price?"

"Magic inscriptions are very precious, I don't think anyone would be willing to sell them."

"How naive this young man is! How many Spirit Stones has he got, really?"

Many people shook their heads and left. A few people asked him how much money he would give.

Seeing this, Xu Que was a bit unhappy and said, "Do not miss this opportunity. I am from the Exploding Heavens Faction and intend to buy magic inscriptions for a high price! Come and have a look!"

Then he summoned his system storage and poured out millions of low-quality Spirit Stones on the ground.

Throughout the years, he had killed countless people and gotten countless storage rings. There were not only millions of Spirit Stones of low quality, but also a great number of Spirit Stones of medium, high and top quality.

He had poured out millions of Spirit Stones of low quality to appeal to the people, and he had intend succeeded at stunning all the cultivators who were present.

Spirit Stones were the universal currency in the World of Cultivators. They could not only be used to enhance the abilities of their holders, but could also be used as a currency to buy either magic weapons or medicine.

The people from a few small-scale factions were also stunned. "Where has he come from? Does he just carry around a bunch Spirit Stones like this?"

"Can it be possible that he stole these stones from his home?"

"He is really bold. Although this is the Imperial City, there are still plenty of bad guys around here, especially these days."

"If he is seen by the Gang of Twelve of the Imperial City, he will definitely be robbed."

"A few days ago, a thug took a young girl away in a broad daylight and made her his concubine, but he was not arrested simply because his cousin was a member of the Gang of Twelve."

A middle-aged man walked forward and smiled. "Young man, I am the boss of Zhai Bao Ge, a store in which I sell all kinds of magic inscriptions. I am planning to leave here in a few days. If you have enough Spirit Stones to buy my store, I can sell it to you."

"Oh? How many magic inscriptions you have got in total?" Xu Que became interested.

"Around fifty books of them. One is of the Earth Rank, thirty are of the Black Rank and twenty are of Yellow Rank." the man said.

Xu Que was a bit upset. "Only one is of the Earth Rank? Well, never mind. I will buy them all. How many stones do you want?"

"Huh…" the man was speechless.

Only one is of the Earth Rank? What are you talking about? The magic inscription itself is very precious. The Zhai Bao Ge is a huge store in the city. Even if I had one of the Sky Rank, I would not possibly sell it to anyone else.

The man thought for a while and said, "Eight million Spirit Stones of low quality, what do you think? After all, my store is quite a famous one here."

Eight million Spirit Stones?

Everyone at present was surprised.

Can this young man really afford that?

In fact, the middle-aged man did not think Xu Que would have that many stones. He had been trying to sell his store for days and he had received no buyers yet. Now he had met Xu Que. Although he did not feel very positive about this, he still wanted to have a try.

"Fine! No problem! Eight million Spirit Stones equals to just eighty thousand Spirit Stones of medium quality. It's damn cheap!"

chapters.title: Chapter 425: Magic Inscriptions Of Star Rank
chapters.body:
Chapter 425: Magic Inscriptions Of Star Rank

Chapter 425: Magic Inscriptions of Star Rank

Translator: Nyoi-Bo Studio Editor: Nyoi-Bo Studio

In the World of Cultivators, the exchange rate between the Spirit Stones of low and medium quality was 100 to 1.

A hundred Spirit Stones of low quality equalled to one Spirit Stone of medium quality, and a hundred Spirit Stones of medium quality equalled to one Spirit Stone of high quality.

Xu Que had looted many treasure vaults and imperial tombs and had thus obtained around a few million Spirit Stones of medium quality, which meant a few hundreds of millions of Spirit Stones of low quality.

Moreover, he had around a few million Spirit Stones of high quality and tens of thousands of top ones. He was like a walking treasure vault. His fortune could outweigh the fortune of two or three countries put together.

Seeing this, everyone was shocked.

Who is he? He even thinks eight million Spirit Stones is cheap? Does he have a rich dad?

The middle-aged man of the Zhai Bao Ge was thinking the same thing. He had expected Xu Que to bargain with him…

This young man is really…

The man hurriedly said, "Young man, why not pay a visit to my store?"

"Good! Show me the way. Anyone who wants to sell his magic inscriptions can come to me!" Xu Que replied.

He quickly picked up all the stones on the ground and left with the middle-aged man.

The Zhai Bao Ge was located in the fringes of the Imperial City. It was not very large, and was at most as big as a small room. There were a few bookshelves inside.

"Young man, all the magic inscriptions of the Black and Yellow Ranks are all in the shelves. As for that Earth Rank one, since it is very precious, I always take it with me. Have a look," the man said, taking out a jade bamboo slip. Then he handed it to Xu Que.

Xu Que scanned it with his Soul Strength and found that the inscriptions were all about swords and things alike. He immediately lost interest and decided to let the System recycle it.

The man was surprised when he saw Xu Que shaking his head. He then asked, "Young man, what is wrong?"

"Nothing. It is just the inscriptions in this book are a bit lame. Anyway, I will take them. Here are the stones." Xu Que said while taking out eight hundred Spirit Stones of high quality.

The middle-aged man was surprised by his generosity.

Normally, only people of high rank possessed Spirit Stones of high quality. He had never thought that the young man in front of him would be so generous.

It seems that this young man is someone of high rank!

Xu Que stood in front of the bookshelf and put all the books into the system storage. Then he ordered the System to recycle all of them.

Ding! "'Water Cloud Mind' has been recycled. The reward is 20 Skill Essence."

Ding! "'Sea Controlling Palm' has been recycled. The reward is 19 Skill Essence."

Ding! "'Blue Water Inscription' has been recycled. The reward is 30 Skill Essence."

…

Soon, all the magic inscriptions, including the one of the Earth Rank, had been recycled.

Suddenly, the System stopped and a notification rang.

Ding! "There are some magic inscriptions of the Star Rank in the book 'Heavenly Water Sword', should the process of recycling stop?"

"What? A magic inscription of Star Rank? I have never heard of this before," Xu Que said.

He had thought that there were only four Ranks in total—Black, Yellow, Earth and Sky.

After hearing this, Xu Que got very excited and could not keep calm.

The Nine Secrets and the Buddha's Fiery Lotus, which are two very powerful magic inscriptions, are of the Sky Rank. The inscription of the Star Rank must be even more powerful.

Ding! "If the host upgrades the System to version 4.0, the inscriptions of Star Rank will show up in the System store."

"Give me that book of Star Rank!" Xu Que did not want to upgrade the System since it would cost him about twenty thousand Acting Tough Points. He only wanted to find out what sort of magic inscriptions could be put into the category of Star Rank, which had to be higher than Sky Rank.

Ding! "The 'Heavenly Water Sword' is already stored in the system storage."

He immediately took it out from his storage.

The System said that a few magic inscriptions were mixed in with the other content of the 'Heavenly Water Sword', how can I find them?

Seeing Xu Que holding that book, the middle-aged man then said, "Young man, are you interested in swordplay? This book is very common. I bought it from an overseas seller. With the stones you have, you can go to the auction and buy some magic inscriptions of Sky Rank."

"Okay. You can leave now. If you want to sell magic inscriptions again, remember to come to me," Xu Que said.

The man was about to leave. Then he turned back and put a thousand Spirit Stones of low quality on the desk.

"By the way. This is the street fee of this month."

"What?! Street fee?" Xu Que stopped the middle-aged man.

"You don't know about this? Anyone who is doing business in the Imperial City has to pay the street fee to the Gang of Twelve every month."

"How dare they! Anyway, you take them back. I do not intend to continue running this store. I will teach them a lesson for you sake." Xu Que waved his hand.

Hearing this, the man said: "don't say that! You will put yourself in danger. One member in the Gang of Twelve is the relative of the royal family, he is the only son of the third Duke. Even the Water Empress dares not punish him!"

"No way! I heard that the Water Empress is very decent and has been managing this country very well. How can this sort of person not be punished?" Xu Que felt interested.

The man sighed. "both the late King and the few dukes did not have many offspring. During the war between us and the Metal Nation, most of their offspring died. Currently, the third duke has only one son, who can still produce 'pure' offspring for the royal family. Although the Water Empress is now ruling the country, she is still a woman, and her bloodline will not be pure. That is why the Water Empress does not punish him."

"Men are superior to women? This sort of idea is completely wrong and should be abolished. You should leave now." Xu Que cursed a bit and began to study that book again.

He sat in the Zhai Bao Ge and studied the book for a long time, but failed to find the inscriptions he needed.

He summoned the System and asked, "Are you sure you're not joking? Where are the magic inscriptions of the Star Rank?"

Ding! "The inscriptions are buried in the sentences in the book. To decipher it, you need to spend one hundred Acting Tough Points."

"Fine! You really are greedy! Help me to decipher it and then put it into a jade bamboo slip!"

He could not wait to find out what the inscription of Star Rank was like.

Ding! "Already deciphered. You have lost a hundred and ten Acting Tough Points."

"What?! You just said 'one hundred Acting Tough Points', why did you charge me an extra ten points?"

Ding! "Making the jade bamboo slip costs ten points."

chapters.title: Chapter 426: One Turning Into Three Pure Ones
chapters.body:
Chapter 426: One Turning Into Three Pure Ones

Chapter 426: One turning into Three Pure Ones

Translator: Nyoi-Bo Studio Editor: Nyoi-Bo Studio

He was speechless.

But he could not do anything about it. He had decided not to return the Acting Tough Points he had loaned.

"The deadline is in nine months later… by that time, I would have already revived the Exploding Heavens Faction. Then no one would dare ask me to pay back the debt."

Anyway, he now had a new jade bamboo slip, and the hidden magic inscriptions of the Star Rank were written upon it.

"Let me have a good look at you!" Xu Que smiled and scanned it with his Soul Strength.

The next minute, he exclaimed: "holy sh*t! 'One turning into Three Pure Ones'? I haven't seen it in the System, and I never thought that such a thing would be here."

'One turning into Three Pure Ones' was a very powerful magic inscription. Having featured in ancient Chinese fairy tales, it had been created by Taishang Laojun, the Heavenly Lord of Tao and Virtue.

It was said that when he had been fighting against the Tong Tian Leader, he had created three pure ones: the Jade Pure One, the Supreme Pure One and the Grand Pure One.

Xu Que was surprised when he read the description of the magic inscription.

"One turning into Three Pure Ones (chapter three)" :

'The Tao produced One; One produced Two; Two produced Three; Three produced All things. The three turned into three chi, the three chi then turned into three pure ones. When the owner collects all the chapters, he can master this magic inscription and even choose his own fate!'

…

Why is the 'One turning into Three Pure Ones' a bit different from what I imagined it to be in this world? It seems stranger.

"System, are you sure this book is real? It did not even mention any techniques. Must I really make a great effort to master this inscription, simply to change my own fate? Is it really necessary?" Xu Que asked himself.

He himself was not afraid of anyone—otherwise he would not have dared establish the Exploding Heavens Faction.

Therefore, he did not think he needed to change his own fate. Although this inscription was one of the Star Rank, it had no techniques, and this made Xu Que feel rather upset.

"I have been refining the skills of the ancient five elemental arts, and I have learned the effect of the Qi of five elements. As for the inscription of Star Rank, I would have to wait until I finishing mastering it to see what happens… I don't even think I can wait that long!" Xu Que said. He still did not believe it was real.

After a while, the System said, "It is an original inscription of this world. What is rational is actual and what is actual is rational."

"What is rational is actual and what is actual is rational? I can't believe you're talking about philosophy with me now…" Xu Que was confused.

Then he threw that book back into his storage.

Fine. Anyway, that book did not cost me anything and now it is of no use to me, so I shall just put it aside. Besides, I would have to master the first chapter and the second chapter before I can practice the third one! This is ridiculous!

"I still have the Shadowmeld of Three Thousand Thunders. After I master that, I will be invincible. System, use all the Skills Essence to upgrade the 'the Shadowmeld of Three Thousand Thunders'."

All the fifty books he bought were recycled and turned into 1500 points of Skills Essence.

Ding! "1500 Skills Essence consumed. Upgrading, 30 percent."

What the f*ck!

Xu Que was stunned.

I have f*cking spent 1500 Skills Essence, but the process of upgrading is still 30 percent?!

"Never mind. You must be a fake System, I no longer want to ask anything from you," Xu Que said angrily. He felt as if he would explode if he heard one more word from the System.

…

There was a restaurant on the other side of the street, from which people were coming and going.

On the second floor, there were only a few young people drinking and eating.

Although it was crowded downstairs with many people, no one dared to go upstairs.

"Haha, Young Twelve, it is really a great honour that you have come to our restaurant!" a chap in blue clothes said to a handsome young man.

The handsome young man, who he had addressed as 'Young Twelve', smiled. "Before, the Imperial City was under the Ice Queen's control and I was forbidden to go out. Now that she has run away, I can finally enjoy myself around the city!"

The other young men and women sitting next to him asked with excitement, "Have you found something interesting? Tell us and show us! We have also been grounded for the past few months and we are so bored."

"Yes! When that Ice Queen came here, I couldn't even step out of my room. I have to enjoy myself today!"

"Luckily that Ice Queen left in the end, otherwise I might have died of boredom."

"I heard that the Water Empress sent a powerful General called Zhuge to reclaim the Imperial City, do you know who he is?"

"I think he must be very old, otherwise he wouldn't be so powerful! I have been told that he managed to take all the lost ten cities back within just two days."

"That can't be true. But anyway, that man must be very old and powerful."

Obviously, these young people did not know what had really transpired.

The handsome young man was the only son of the third Duke. The young people surrounding him were all members of his gang. He heard what they were talking about and sneered. "No matter how powerful he is, he is just a servant to us royals, isn't he?"

Hearing this, the young men and women around him all laughed. "Yes, you are right! No matter how powerful he is, he will have to kill the enemy and protect the country for your sake."

"Let's drop this tedious topic, remember we come out for fun today. I heard that there was a young man wanting to buy some magic inscriptions today. They said that young man had a million Spirit Stones of low quality!" Young Twelve smiled. He was playing with a cup in his hands and staring at Zhai Bao Ge, which was on the other side of the street.

"I see… you want to go play with that young man!"

"I heard that he has bought the Zhai Bao Ge, so he must have plenty of Spirit Stones."

"No wonder Young Twelve came to this shabby restaurant. See, Zhai Bao Ge is just on the other side of this street," a young man said, pointing to the shop.

...

chapters.title: Chapter 427: You Are Going To Die Now!
chapters.body:
Chapter 427: You Are Going To Die Now!

Chapter 427: You Are Going To Die Now!

Translator: Nyoi-Bo Studio Editor: Nyoi-Bo Studio

"Haha. He looks so handsome!" a young woman said excitedly when she squinted inside the Zhai Bao Ge.

A young man next her said in a low voice, "Are you blind? Our Young Twelve is much more handsome than him!"

The young woman smiled. "Of course, our Young Twelve is the most handsome man!"

Clearly, Young Twelve was greatly respected by them. The rest of the young men and women around him all looked like they came from high ranks as well, but they were still trying to flatter Young Twelve.

"Don't talk nonsense! Let's make a bet first. I have sent someone to make trouble for him. Let's see if he will fight back or not," Young Twelve said.

These young people all said together, "He will definitely not fight back!"

"How dare he fight back? How dare he hurt Young Twelve's people?"

"We should make a bet on whether he will cry or not. Haha!"

...

In the past, when the Water Empress was still in the city, Young Twelve would behave himself and would avoid taking things to the extreme. Due to this, the Water Empress had not been too strict on him.

Now, apart from the Princess Zi Xuan, Young Twelve was the most powerful man around and no one dared to offend him or his servants.

So as for their bet, they all made a bet that Xu Que would not dare to fight back.

Young Twelve suddenly laughed: "You guys are too dumb! That young man must is new to this city. He might not even know about me, which means he will definitely fight back. Otherwise, what's the point of making trouble for him?"

"That totally makes sense, I suddenly realize that I have never seen him before," a young man said.

"Then there is a great chance that he will fight back!"

"It's getting more and more interesting."

The rest of the people all got very interested in this bet.

"Let's have a bet on how many times he will hit my servants. Count carefully—if he hits my servants once, I will punch him ten times later!" Young Twelve smiled.

Hearing this, the young people at present were surprised and felt a bit sorry for Xu Que.

…

Meanwhile, Xu Que was about to leave the Zhai Bao Ge.

He was now very angry. He had expected to finish the process of upgrading the Shadowmeld of Three Thousand Thunders…

He would have to buy at least another hundred books of magic inscriptions to be able to fully upgrade the Shadowmeld of Three Thousand Thunders. The owner of the Zhai Bao Ge had been an exception. Others would not be willing to sell their own precious magic inscriptions.

Xu Que was feeling rather upset as he walked out of the Zhai Bao Ge. Suddenly, a few people appeared and stopped him.

They were all very strong and wearing terrifying expressions on their faces. They were in the Golden Core Stage, but they were not afraid of Xu Que at all.

One of the men stared at Xu Que and shouted, "Young man, where is the owner of the store?"

"I am the owner. I am not in a great mood now, so please f*ck off!" Xu Que was feeling even more now irritated due to the appearance of these odious men.

"How dare you talk to us in this tone? Do you have any idea who you are talking to?" a man said.

"I don't care! Now f*ck off!" Xu Que said impatiently.

People in the street were drawn by the bickering and they all gathered around the store.

"They are the servants of Young Twelve! That young man must be mad, otherwise he would not dare to speak to them like that!"

"He is doomed. He just bought this store with eight million Spirit Stones of low quality, and now they are making trouble for him."

"He must be new to this city, I do feel sorry for him."

…

People began to feel sorry for Xu Que.

On the second floor of the restaurant, a young man said, "Young Twelve, people are gathering, what if the Water Empress finds out about this…"

Young Twelve smiled: "do not worry! The more people there are, the more interesting things will be! Remember to count how many times he hits my servants!"

"Yes!" These young people got excited again.

…

In the Zhai Bao Ge, one of the odious men said, "Young man, we do not want to make things difficult for you. Just give us the street fee. Since you are new to this city, you can just give us ten thousand Spirit Stones for this month."

You must be out of your mind! How dare you try to collect the damn street fee from me?

Xu Que sneered. "I see, the Gang of Twelve has sent you here!"

The odious men snickered. "Give us the street fee! Otherwise, you will regret it later!"

"But I heard that it is one thousand Spirit Stones per month. Are you f*cking out of your mind? You want to take ten thousand Spirit Stones from me?" Xu Que sneered and felt extremely angry.

Hearing this, all the people present took a deep breath.

Is this young man mad?! He already knows that these people were sent by the Gang of Twelve, he should at least change his tone. Young Twelve is notorious for his bad temper, anyone who offends his servants will be severely punished!

"How dare you!" the odious men said together. "How dare you talk with us like this? You have offended us, which means you have offended Young Twelve! We are the bosses around here, if we want you to hand us ten thousand Spirit Stones, you must do as we instruct. We can even ask you to hand us a hundred thousand Spirit Stones if we want. Indeed, I have changed my mind now—you'd better kneel down in front of us and give us a hundred thousand Spirit Stones… otherwise you will die tonight!"

The people present all shook their heads and looked at Xu Que with great sympathy.

Hearing this, Xu Que sneered. "you are just the dogs of the Gang of Twelve. How dare you stand in front of me and threaten me? Let me tell you one thing, you are going to die now!"

The next moment, a sword flew through the air like lightning, right in front of these odious men.

chapters.title: Chapter 428: You Have Got More People On Your Side
chapters.body:
Chapter 428: You Have Got More People On Your Side

Chapter 428: You Have Got More People On Your Side

Translator: Nyoi-Bo Studio Editor: Nyoi-Bo Studio

In a split second, the throats of all the men were cut. Blood spurted out as their lifeless bodies fell to the ground.

Everyone at present was stunned. No one made any sound.

No one saw had seen where the sword had come from, and they could not believe that Xu Que had dared kill people in the street in broad daylight. And even worse, he had killed Young Twelve's servants.

On the second floor of the restaurant, the youths were all silent and shocked.

"He... he killed... people!" a young woman said while her body trembled.

"Killing a person in the Imperial City is a capital crime!"

"He must be mad!"

They could not believe their eyes. After all, no one had ever killed anyone before under the rule of the Water Empress.

Young Twelve, however, smiled and got very excited.

He laughed. "It's getting more interesting! He's killed people, so I can too!"

"What?!" the young people were confused.

"Young Twelve, you're joking, right? What if the Water Empress comes back?"

"There is no need to be afraid. He has already committed a capital crime. Even if the Water Empress comes back, I can just say that I killed to protect the civilians, then she will have no choice but to reward me!" Young Twelve sneered.

"Haha! Our Young Twelve is really smart!"

"But that young man is in the Infant Transformation Stage, I don't think we can beat him!" a young man said.

Young Twelve said, "Take my token with you and bring a thousand soldiers here. Tell them to catch that young man who has just committed a capital crime."

"Yes!"

A young man took the token and hurriedly got off the restaurant.

…

Everyone was staring at Xu Que. Their eyes were full of fear and surprise.

Xu Que casually took back his sword as if nothing had happened.

He glanced at the corpses on the ground and said, "I have told you already that I am not in a good mood today. I finally had the chance to take a break today. Do you know killed a whole lot of people just two days ago? Did you really think I would be Mr Soft?"

Hearing this, the people at present were almost frightened to death.

He killed many people just two days ago? And he finally took a break from it? Does that mean he is a professional killer or someone who kills people everyday or something? No wonder he is acting so calm…

"Ladies and gentlemen!" Xu Que said and looked at them.

Does he want us to be his witnesses? I cannot possibly do this, I do not want to offend Young Twelve!

Thinking of this, many people tried to leave..

Xu Que suddenly took out a wood plate. There were a few words on it, which read 'buying various kinds of magic inscriptions for a high price'. He shouted, "Do not miss this great opportunity. I would love to buy magic inscriptions for a high price. Anyone who is interested, come to me!"

What?! What's wrong with him? Seriously, you just killed people, don't you want to run away? Instead, you are staying here and trying to do business? You are really very bold…
