One was in white, the other was in black. The two kept chanting the magic inscriptions in an effort to harm each other. Because of this, the whole sky was lit up with a rainbow of color.

As Nine Tailed Demon Fox, Su Ling’er was very talented. She was in the second level of the Infant Transformation Stage.

Her opponent, who was in black, was in the fourth level of the Infant Transformation Stage. He was so powerful that the very essence of matter around him twisted into void at his command.

Bang!

They had been fighting for many hours. Soon, Su Ling’er could no longer fight back. She staggered backward. Blood flew out of her mouth and stained her white clothes.

“Su Ling’er, I suggest you give in and surrender to me,” the man said. “As long as you and your peers agree to be my slaves for eternity, I might keep you alive,” he sneered.

“Lin Yi, if you dare to destroy my clan, Sun Wu Kong will hunt you down, no matter where you are!” Su Ling’er said coldly.

“Haha! Sun Wu Kong? You mean the former Demon King who was in the Original Infant Stage? Why on earth should I be afraid of him?!” Lin Yi sneered, shaking his head. “Yes, he indeed killed one of my lords with his God Powered Cannon. However, if it were not for that lord’s incompetence and over-confidence, he could not possibly have killed anyone in my clan. Besides, I can simply smash any God Powered Cannon with my fist.”

“Really?! How about the Exploding Heavens Faction? Dare you say you are not afraid it?” Su Ling’er said.

“Su Ling’er, as far as I am concerned, the members of the Exploding Heavens Faction are all human. Perhaps you have forgotten. The Mysterious Clan has never had a good relationship with humans! Besides, I have never heard anything about this so-called Sun Wu Kong from anyone except yourself”

“…” Su Ling’er was speechless and her face turned extremely pale.

She had been trying to search for Sun Wu Kong during the past year. She had heard about Xu Que and Hua Wu Que from the Exploding Heavens Faction, but she had heard nothing about Sun Wu Kong… Because of this, her peers had doubts about the Shaman Demon King being a member of the Exploding Heavens Faction. After all, it was not unusual for a Shaman Demon King to lie.

“You have been fighting us for two months and have lost many peers. You cannot save your people from being ruined. Why not just give in and surrender while I am still in a good mood. Otherwise, I will definitely kill you all,” Lin Yi smiled.

If Lin Yi had really wanted to kill the entire Mysterious Clan, he could have done it a month ago. However, he wanted to capture some members of the Mysterious Clan and make them his slaves. Once he did this, he would be famous and even be elected to be the next King of the Demonic Beast Clan.

“Really, there is no need to prolong this battle any longer,” he said.

Su Ling’er was badly injured and was about to collapse at any moment. She then began to recall the memories she had of Sun Wu Kong.

He was so tough that he would scare off Heavenly Tribulations. Once, when my peers were surrounded by Demonic Beasts, he alone killed the head of the Demonic Beast Clan who was in the Infant Transformation Stage.

Now he is gone and we are under the attack of the Demonic Beasts again. My peers are almost wiped out. We have been here for almost two months. He still has not shown himself.

Thinking of this, Su Ling’er felt the fire of hope in her heart begin to die out.

“Does this mean my clan is going to be wiped out today? Does this mean we will just… disappear?!” Su Ling’er said. “Sun Wu Kong, where are you?!”

…

Meanwhile, Xu Que had arrived at Demon City, the city of the Demonic Beast Clan.

Since he did not take the time to properly set up a teleportation array, he failed to arrive at the center of the city. Instead, he arrived at a place that was just miles away from the city.

“F*ck! How come there are so many Demonic Beasts here?!” Buttface said. He was shocked by what he saw.

Xu Que hurriedly looked into the distance and spotted Su Ling’er.

She is still alive! What good fortune!

“Buttface! Come! Let’s kill those Demonic Beasts. Later, I will reward you with delicious Stinky Tofu,” Xu Que said in a low voice. He then headed towards the city.

…

Inside the city, many severely injured members of the Mysterious Clan were already deeply buried in desperation. Su Xiao Qi was one of them. When she saw her sister standing outside, she shouted at her.

“Enough! Sister! Sun Wu Kong will not come back! Neither will the Exploding Heavens Faction. Sun Wu Kong was never a member of the Exploding Heavens Faction to begin with. Let’s just surrender to him! Sister!”

If it’s between being wiped out or surrendering, you should choose to surrender, Su Xiao Qi thought. I am sure that as long as I am still alive, I can find an opportunity to take revenge on the Demonic Beasts Clan and reestablish the Mysterious Clan!

Su Ling’er gently shook her head.

“We should never give up, no matter if Sun Wu Kong comes back or not. If we give in, our clan will suffer!”

“So, do you really want our clan to be wiped out?!” Su Xiao Qi asked. She was still very young. She had no idea what would actually happen if they surrendered.

Su Ling’er shook her head again.

“Sun Wu Kong must be a member of the Exploding Heavens Faction. If he wasn’t, he could not possibly have created the God Powered Cannons. Even if we all die, I am sure that he would avenge us.”

“Hahaha! Su Ling’er, you are so naive!” Lin Yi said with a laugh. “You still think that the Exploding Heavens Faction will send someone to save you, avenge you?! Even your younger sister is more practical than you! Give up!”

“Hahaha!” The Demonic Beasts all laughed. They began to mock Su Ling’er.

“She is a member of the Mysterious Clan and she hopes a human from the Exploding Heavens Faction will come to save her?! This is ludicrous!”

“Your former King, Sun Wu Kong, is just a liar! He can not possibly be a member of the Exploding Heavens Faction.”

“Even if he is, it would not make any difference. We are not afraid of the Exploding Heavens Faction at all.”

“Human cultivators are far more feeble than we Demonic Beasts.”

“Yes! The Exploding Heavens Faction is made up of a bunch of losers!”

“That Monkey King is just a prank. You are so silly to believe in him.”

They were laughing louder and louder.

The members of the Mysterious Clan were getting more and more worried and their faces were getting paler by the minute.

“Su Ling’er, surrender!” Lin Yi said. “Stop daydreaming! Even if Sun Wu Kong or the Exploding Heavens Faction comes, you are destined to die together with all your peers. You are too naive to be the head of your clan.”

Su Ling’er was about to say something, but suddenly, there was a sound as loud as thunder.

Bang!

More than ten figures were traveling to the city by running on the tops of thunderclouds.

“By order of Sun Wu Kong, the head of the Exploding Heavens Faction, I, Xu Que, am coming to help!”

“By order of Sun Wu Kong, the head of the Exploding Heavens Faction, I, Hua Wu Que, am coming to help!”

“By order of Sun Wu Kong, the head of the Exploding Heavens Faction, I, Ye Liang Chen, am coming to help!”

“By order of Sun Wu Kong, the head of the Exploding Heavens Faction, I, Wu Wu Kai, am coming to help!”

“By order of Sun Wu Kong, the head of the Exploding Heavens Faction, I, Xue Zhi Qian, am coming to help!”

chapters.title: Chapter 492 - Everyone, Keep Shouting!
chapters.body:
Chapter 492 - Everyone, Keep Shouting!

Chapter 492: Everyone, Keep Shouting!

Translator: Nyoi-Bo Studio Editor: Nyoi-Bo Studio

Eleven figures! They arrived just like they had before in the Great Change Sect assembly hall, wearing black robes and masks. What a majestic and mysterious organization!

Their voices caused everyone’s eardrums to tremble. It was as if the sound was coming from the universe itself.

Everyone was silent, staring at the eleven unbelievable figures descending from the sky. The eleven figures landed majestically. All of them were powerhouses at the Infant Transformation Stage!

The Exploding Heavens Faction… is really here!

Moreover, Sun Wu Kong is… the Faction Leader of the Exploding Heavens Faction!

How could a monkey at the Original Infant Stage become the Faction Leader of so many powerhouses?

My Gosh! How can this be possible?

This really shocked Su Ling’er and her people. Sun Wu Kong had told them that he was a member of the Exploding Heavens Faction, but he had never said anything about being the Faction Leader.

Since the Mysterious Clan hadn’t heard anything about Sun Wu Kong since he left them, many members of the Mysterious Clan had begun to suspect that Sun Wu Kong had cheated them. However, now that they knew he was the Faction leader of the Exploding Heavens Faction, everything began to make sense.

This explains everything!

No wonder we haven’t heard of any news about Sun Wu Kong. The Faction Leader of the Exploding Heavens Faction has always been mysterious and unknown.

Now we finally understand. Since no one knew who the Faction Leader of the Exploding Heavens Faction was, it makes sense that we received no news about Sun Wu Kong.

The Demonic Beasts were terrified. Before, they thought Sun Wu Kong meant nothing. They didn’t know that Sun Wu Kong was actually a member of the Exploding Heavens Faction, much less the Faction Leader!

“Impossible, this is absolutely impossible! How…could a monkey of the Mysterious Clan, who is only at the Original Infant Stage, be your leader?” Lin Yi of the Demonic Beast Clan asked in disbelief.

Lin Yi’s face fell. As a powerhouse at level four of the Infant Transformation Stage, he was very powerful. However, in front of so many powerhouses at level three of the Infant Transformation Stage, he became nervous.

Whoosh!

The eleven figures fixed their cold eyes on him through their masks. A sharp voice then broke the silence.

“Who told you I am only at the Original Infant Stage?”

The next moment, a burst of music came in.

Dun dun dun…dun dun…dun dun dun…

The Small Swords Society Overture began to play[1]. Everyone held their breath and looked up into the sky. A figure was flying on clouds. The impassioned theme music added to the magnificence of his entrance.

Sun Wu Kong then came into full view. However, this Sun Wu Kong was actually just Xu Que in disguise. Xu Que was using the Disguise Puppet to change his appearance.

He was wearing golden chain mail, violet phoenix wings, a gold helmet, and lotus root cloud boots[2]. The Monkey King Bar in his hands was dazzling. Although it was not the legendary Monkey King Bar, it was enough to shock everyone. The clouds slowed to a stop and began to disperse from underneath his feet.

Boom!

Sun Wu Kong landed on the ground, cracking it with his heavy landing. His presence was so domineering that no one dared to look him in the eye.

“How…could this be possible?”

“Level three of the Infant Transformation Stage!”

Everyone was shocked.

Over one year ago, this monkey was just at level six of the Original Infant Stage. Now he had reached level three of the Infant Transformation Stage. This progress was hard for people to believe.

How could such an outrageous thing happen?

This must be a fake monkey, right?

“Sun Wu Kong!” Su Ling’er exclaimed delightfully. She let out a breath of relief. She was filled with endless joy and pleasant surprise.

The Mysterious Clan was on the verge of extinction. Su Ling’er and her people had almost lost their faith and were ready to face their death. But at last, Sun Wu Kong had arrived, and in such a domineering and majestic way.

“I’m late!” Xu Que said solemnly, looking at the countless bodies of Mysterious Clan members on the battlefield,

“Are you Sun Wu Kong?” Lin Yi asked suddenly.

Lin Yi’s question had very bad timing and was asked with a very bad attitude. Xu Que was already angry because of how many of the Mysterious Clan members were dead. Lin Yi’s comment just added fuel to his rage.

“F*ck you! Stop wasting my time! Taste my Monkey King Bar!” Xu Que cursed.

Xu Que jumped up and swung his bar directly at Lin Yi.

Lin Yi’s expression fell. He then started to use magic arts to defend himself. He had never met such a straightforward person, someone who just attacked at first sight. This was outrageous!

However, he was not frightened. He was never afraid when he was engaged in close combat scenarios. In fact, the reason he had addressed Sun Wu Kong in the first place was to prevent the members of the Exploding Heavens Faction from attacking him all at once. After all, he was definitely outnumbered and knew he couldn’t fight them all at the same time.

“You are seeking death!” Lin Yi snorted.

Lin Yi clenched his fists. A black shadow appeared behind him. It looked just like a giant ox head.

Seeing this, Su Ling’er shouted at Xu Que.

“Be careful, Sun Wu Kong! He is an ox demon. The ox demon bloodline is very powerful. Please, be careful!”

Bang!

Xu Que’s Monkey King Bar collided with Lin Yi’s fist. Both of them were blown away by the airwaves that resulted from the collision.

The Monkey King Bar in Xu Que’s hands was completely destroyed. This shocked him a bit.

This ox demon really is powerful! No wonder he was able to destroy the God Powered Cannon. His physique is remarkably strong.

Mysterious Clan was frightened on behalf of Xu Que whereas the Demonic Beasts were smiling. They were proud of the strength of their leader.

However, Lin Yi was even more shocked than Xu Que. He couldn’t believe this monkey could be so powerful as to break even with him in such a direct collision.

Lin Yi had just recently reached level four of the Infant Transformation Stage. However, he had increased strength because of this bloodline. On top of this, he had learned an ancient physique strengthening art. Therefore, he was strong enough to win against cultivators at level six of the Infant Transformation Stage in the Demonic Beast Clan.

But now, he was losing against a little monkey who was only at level three of the Infant Transformation Stage. How could this be happening!?

“Your magic artifact is gone. How do you expect to fight me now?” Lin Yi said with a cold smile. He was trying to intimidate Xu Que.

However, Xu Que just smiled disdainfully.

“Without my magic artifact, your defeat will be even more miserable!”

Seeing that Xu Que was going to fight with only his fists, the people of the Mysterious Clan were very anxious. The Demonic Beasts were gloating sarcastically.

Ignoring the other Demonic Beasts, Xu Que clenched his fist and performed the Hell King’s Prison Suppression Style. Lightning bolts and flames started to flow on the surface of his body. This indicated that his cultivation of these two elements had been completed. He dashed directly towards Lin Yi.

Bang!

Another direct collision, this time fist against fist! The power from this collision was even more formidable than the last one. It seemed like the very air itself was about to crack under the pressure of the collision.

Rumble!

Lin Yi was blown away. His knuckles were broken and bleeding.

Xu Que, on the other hand, was unscratched. He was smiling coldly.

The consequence of this collision shocked everyone.

“I told you your defeat would be more miserable without the magic artifact!” Xu Que said majestically.

Everyone fell silent. Everyone in the Mysterious Clan held their mouths agape. The Demonic Beast Clan was also totally dumbfounded. Their King, who had the strongest physique of them all, was severely injured by a monkey’s fist!

When the Mysterious Clan came to their senses, they started to shout with excitement.

“Shaman Demon King!”

“Shaman Demon King!”

“Shaman Demon King!”

…

Xu Que’s mouth twitched involuntarily.

Sh*t! Don’t call me Dirty Demon King[3], OK? How could I be dirty by hitting someone with my fist? Lin Yi! You are the Dirty Demon King!

In his anger, Xu Que tried to punch Lin Yi in the chest, but Lin Yi blocked the attack this his good hand.

Puff!

Lin Yi was shocked. This guy was still attacking him!?

Even though Lin Yi blocked Xu Que’s punch, the blow was still enough to injure him. He spat a mouthful of fresh blood.

Before Lin Yi had time to react, Xu Que punched him a second time. And a third time. And a fourth! He just kept punching!

“Shaman Demon King! Shaman Demon King!”

Seeing Xu Que punch the living daylights out of Lin Yi, the people of the Mysterious Clan became even more excited. Their cheers were never-ending.

As Xu Que became angrier and angrier, his punches became faster and faster. He then gave Lin Yi a one-two punch that launched him into the sky like a sandbag before he came crashing back down to the ground.

Bang!

Bang!

…Bang!

Lin Yi could barely defend himself, let alone fight back. He could clearly sense that Xu Que was becoming angrier. Why else would his punches be increasing in speed like this? Lin Yi was in tearless grief. He spit up more blood.

Why are you so mad at me? Why is your punching becoming more and more ferocious?

“Look!” a member of the Mysterious Clan said in surprise. “It seems our Shaman Demon King’s attack is becoming more and more ferocious!”

“You’re right! How is this even possible?”

“He must be encouraged by our cheers!”

“Exactly! Everyone, just keep shouting! Shaman Demon King, Shaman Demon King, Shaman Demon King…”

[1] Sun Wu Kong is the hero in the play A Chinese Odyssey.

[2] Sun Wu Kong wears all these things in the film A Chinese Odyssey.

[3] Shaman demon king has the same pronunciation as dirty demon king in Chinese.

chapters.title: Chapter 493
chapters.body:
Chapter 493

Chapter 493: Well, We Shall Make Their “Wishes” Come True

Translator: Nyoi-Bo Studio Editor: Nyoi-Bo Studio

Bang!

Xu Que hit Lin Yi so hard that he flew across the sky.

Blood oozed from Lin Yi’s body. Although his body was strong because of his bloodline, he still could not stand Xu Que’s punches. As his body crashed to the ground, he realized that he could not hope to win against Xu Que.

The members of the Mysterious Clan that were outside the tower of the Demon King’s palace continued to shout, hoping to boost Xu Que’s morale.

“Shaman Demon King!”

“Shaman Demon King!”

By rooting for Sun Wu Kong, they were also letting the dozens of injured people in the tower know that they were now winning the battle since most of the people in the tower were too wounded to even see what was going on.

Thousands of Demonic Beasts were standing outside and looking fiercely at Xu Que, like a bunch of tigers staring at their prey.

Xu Que walked over to the helpless Lin Yi.

“You are really pathetic,” he sneered. “I thought you were going to be tough since you inherited the Ox Demon bloodline. I never thought you would be so feeble.”

“Sun Wu Kong, even if you defeat me, you still cannot help them. As soon as I give the order, all the members of the Mysterious Clan will be killed,” Lin Yi shouted in anger.

I am a member of the Demonic Beast Clan, Lin Yi thought. I even inherited the bloodline of the Ox Demons. Yet, I have been physically defeated by someone from the Mysterious Clan! How pathetic!

“So you want your Demonic Beasts to attack me together since you failed to kill me one on one?” Xu Que joked.

Thousands of Demonic Beasts? Really, it’s just a piece of cake to me, Xu Que thought.

The members of the Mysterious Clan were not as confident as Xu Que was. Even though they had the God Powered Cannons, they still felt like they couldn’t possibly to win with so few members of the Mysterious Clan left standing. Once the thousands of Demonic Beasts made their attack against their little force of about a hundred people, they would be done for.

By this time, Su Ling’er had walked over to Xu Que.

“Sun Wu Kong, we’d better retreat,” Su Ling’er whispered to Xu Que.

“There is no need, believe me. Once they dare to move one step, I shall kill them all,” Xu Que said confidently.

Suddenly, Su Ling’er felt Xu Que’s hands on her waist. She blushed as she felt his hands gradually moving downward.

“Sun Wu Kong, stop, please,” Su Ling’er said, staring at Xu Que.

“Sorry, I just can’t help it.”

“Now is not the time for this. I have lost countless peers in battle. We have to try our best to keep the rest alive,” Su Ling’er said with a serious face.

“You mean once I keep them all alive, we can have sex?!” Xu Que asked, his eyes sparkling with excitement.

“Stop being like this.” Su Ling’er blushed. She was so embarrassed!

“Like I said, they are just a piece of cake to me! Hahaha!” Xu Que said, laughing hard. “Leave here in half an hour. Otherwise, I shall kill you all.”

Hearing this, all the Demonic Beasts were a bit afraid. After all, Xu Que was in the Infant Transformation Stage and had already defeated their leader. However, none of them retreated because if they did, they would become the biggest laughing stock in the world. Thousands of Demonic Beasts, frightened off by someone from the Mysterious Clan?! They couldn’t allow this to happen.

Lin Yi sneered. He did not believe that Xu Que could kill thousands of Demonic Beasts all by himself, even with his ten helpers.

“Sun Wu Kong, how dare you be so arrogant?! We both know that if you face my army of Demonic Beasts, you and your faction members would also be badly injured.”

“Save your worry for me. I can promise you that not a single life will be lost on my side. Just bring it on!”

“I never thought you would be as stubborn as this Su Ling’er! Stop talking nonsense! I will agree to retreat if you give me ten people from your side,” Lin Yi said.

As long as I manage to bring ten captives back, I will not become a laughing stock, Lin Yi thought.

Hearing this, Xu Que was amused. Wu Wu Kai began to speak.

“Who do you think who you are?! How dare you make such an absurd request! I warn you, if you and your peers move one step forward, I shall kill you all!” Wu Wu Kai said.

Hearing this, Lin Yi and his peers were astonished and furious.

Xu Que smiled as he secretly controlled his doppelgangers. He stared at the Demonic Beasts on the ground, sizing them up to see if he could kill them all in one hit.

The survivors inside the tower of the Demon King’s palace were worried and afraid. They knew they were under the protection of ten strong men of the Infant Transformation Stage. Still, they felt insecure.

Bang!

He activated the thunder essence inside his body. The thunder essence began to flow to his arm.

“Sun Wu Kong, you really intend to become the enemy of the Demonic Beasts Clan?” Lin Yi asked.

Xu Que smiled and suddenly raised his arm up high. Many lightning bolts appeared and became intertwined. At first, the lightning was blue, then it all turned purple and became shrouded by a golden light. Finally, the lightning formed into a spinning ball of lightning energy.

“Fine! It seems that you have decided to become my enemy.”

Suddenly the thousands of Demonic Beasts on the ground began to shout.

“Sun Wu Kong, you will regret this decision! Prove it to me! Prove how you can wipe out thousands of Demonic Beasts with only one strike!” Lin Yi sneered. “Everyone, go!”

Bang! Bang! Bang!

The earth shook as the Demonic Beasts charged towards the tower.

“Sun Wu Kong, what should we do now?!” Su Ling’er looked at Xu Que.

“I have no idea what to do!” Xu Que sighed.

“What?!” Su Ling’er asked, shocked. Her face turned pale.

He also has no idea what to do? Does this mean the Mysterious Clan is bound to be wiped out today?

“Hmm. Here is an idea. Since they want to die so desperately, I shall make their “wishes” come true!” Xu Que smiled.

Xu Que caused the rotating ball of lightning to become as large as a soccer ball. A massive amount of energy was gathering inside the ball. The ball was emitting countless rays of purple and golden light.

He was almost ready to strike…

chapters.title: Chapter 494 - Do You Like Spicy Beef?
chapters.body:
Chapter 494 - Do You Like Spicy Beef?

Chapter 494: Do You Like Spicy Beef?

Translator: Nyoi-Bo Studio Editor: Nyoi-Bo Studio

“What…magic art are you using?”

“This is impossible! Why do I sense the smell of Heavenly Tribulation?”

“My gosh, could it be that he has absorbed the Heavenly Tribulation and can now use it as a weapon?”

All the Demonic Beasts and Mysterious Clan people were shocked. The ball of lightning in Xu Que’s hands was now so violent that everyone was terrified.

Lin Yi couldn’t help stepping back. The power of the Heavenly Tribulation was familiar to him. Goosebumps rose all over his body.

“Sun Wu Kong, what are you doing? Are you summoning the Heavenly Tribulation? Do you want to get us all killed? ” Lin Yi shouted.

Xu Que smiled coldly.

“Die together with you? You are really imaginative!”

Whoosh!

The ball of lightning in Xu Que’s hand grew to ten times its original size. It was so large that it was almost as tall as Xu Que was.

“I said I will annihilate all of you with one move. Now I will keep my word. Just die!”

Xu Que threw out the giant ball lightning. It smashed into the army of Demonic Beasts like a falling, purple and gold sun.

Rumble!

The ball of lightning exploded. Violet and golden lightning bolts covered the ground like a sea of electric death.

The army of Demonic Beasts, which was now engulfed in a sea of lightning, began to scream. Their skin and flesh became lacerated and they were bleeding everywhere. Some Demonic Beasts were blown away by the airwaves. These were the Demonic Beasts that died instantly.

Demonic Beasts at the Golden Core Stage and the Original Infant Stage were covered by the thunders and lightnings that Xu Que had created. It was as if they were crossing the Heavenly Tribulations. Moreover, they were also experiencing the Heavenly Thunder of Purple Cloud and the Ancient Catastrophe. All of these lightning types combined were tearing the Demonic Beasts apart.

Even Lin Yi, as the Demonic Beast King at level four of the Infant Transformation Stage, was immobilized by the lightning, which had now created numerous cuts on his body. He was bleeding all over. He felt like a tortured mouse drowning in its own blood.

“Sun Wu Kong, Stop!” Lin Yi yelled.

This time, he truly afraid for his life. He couldn’t believe a person of the Mysterious Clan could be so powerful. With a formidable physique and horrible magic arts, this guy was totally unstoppable.

“Shut the f*ck up!” Xu Que snorted.

Xu Que then caused the sea of thunder and lightning on the battlefield to become more ferocious and horrible.

Rumble!

A huge shock wave surged through the Demonic Beast army. Hordes of Demonic Beasts fell to the ground and became lifeless.

The System notifications kept ringing in Xu Que’s mind for successful displays of toughness and for experience bonuses. This battle was really fruitful. He just earned over 3000 Acting Tough Points and tens of millions of Experience Points. Now he was now very close to reaching level four of the Infant Transformation Stage.

“Ah!” Lin Yi screamed.

Despite his strong physique, one of his limbs was cut off by a golden lightning bolt and fell to the ground. White smoke rose from the limb. It smelled like beef. Apparently, it had been cooked by the lightning.

When Buttface, who was hiding a good distance away, got a whiff of the cooked meat, his eyes brightened. He dashed towards the dying Demonic Beasts.

“That ox leg is mine!” Buttface shouted.

Boom!

At this moment, a violet lightning bolt struck Buttface’s body. He screamed bitterly and rushed back. Xu Que’s eyes were wide. Buttface was unscratched. His fur was still shiny.

“You, my dog, are awesome!” Xu Que smiled.

When Buttface arrived back in the safe zone, he fell to the ground as if he had been seriously wounded.

“I am dying,” he said feebly. “You need to cure me with that roasted ox leg!”

Hearing this, Lin Yi was so angry that he was almost about to spit blood.

Where did this f*cking dog come from? He is also a Demonic Beast. Why is he so crude? How dare he plan to eat my flesh?

Xu Que raised his voice so he could be heard over the thunder.

“Buttface, don’t play dead. The ox demon is over there,” Xu Que said, pointing to Lin Yi. “The beef on his bones is tender and delicious. Just kill him and bring the body to me.”

All of the people of the Mysterious Clan were surprised.

The Shaman Demon King is so ferocious!

The battle has not even ended. Yet, he is talking about eating the enemy!

“Fellowmen of the Mysterious Clan, listen to me!” Xu Que shouted.

The people fixed their eyes on Xu Que. They thought their Shaman Demon King had something important to say.

“Please, tell me which you prefer. Boiled beef or the seared beef? And do you like spicy beef?”

“…” The people of the Mysterious Clan were speechless.

“…” Lin Yi was also speechless.

“I like both,” Buttface said. “But can we please prepare it without the spicy seasoning?”

“No problem, just bring me the ingredients,” Xu Que said.

Lin Yi was angry out of his mind. However, he was seriously wounded and had to focus on resisting the lightning, making it impossible for him to express himself.

“Su Ling’er, you can avenge our fellowmen now!” Xu Que said.

Xu Que took out a silver bow and handed it to Su Ling’er. He wanted her to be able to personally avenge her fallen members.

This bow was a six-star magic artifact that Xu Que had purchased from the System. It was more than sufficient to kill the seriously-wounded Lin Yi.

“OK!” she said.

Su Ling’er took the silver bow without any hesitation. She looked at Lin Yi coldly.

The deaths of her peers were so fresh… For two months now, Lin Yi and his clan had been killing her people. The Demonic Beast army had been too powerful. No matter how hard they fought, they were never able win. They were ready to surrender and become slaves to the Demonic Clan.

However, now the tides had turned. She was ready to take her revenge!

Whoosh!

A strand of glowing energy flew from her hand. Then she drew the bow. Spiritual Qi gathered from all directions to form an arrow. She pointed the arrow at Lin Yi’s chest.

“Lin Yi, now it’s your turn to enjoy the feeling of being someone’s prey. Today, I commemorate the members of the Mysterious Clan who were slaughtered by you. For the sacrifice, I will use your blood!” Su Ling’er’s said. Her voice was clear, forceful and cold.

“No, stop!” Lin Yi said.

Lin Yi was totally frightened. He sensed the pressure of impending death.

Thud!

The arrow pierced directly through Lin Yi’s heart.

Bleck!

Lin Yi spat out a mouthful of fresh blood. His entire body was now engulfed by the lightning. He was no longer able to resist it.

Rumble!

Several golden lightning bolts struck Lin Yi, tearing open the rest of his flesh. Finally, Lin Yi’s body into a mist of blood.

“No!” Buttface yelled, letting out a heart-wrenching scream. “That was my seared beef!”

“Su Ling’er, how about some dog meat for tonight’s dinner?” Xu Que asked with a smile.

“F*ck!” Buttface cursed and fled.

“Before you left, you said you were going to cook noodles for me sometime, right?” Su Ling’er asked with a smile.

“Eh, what kind of noodles you want to eat?” Xu Que asked.

chapters.title: Chapter 497 - Being Deeply Moved
chapters.body:
Chapter 497 - Being Deeply Moved

Chapter 497: Being Deeply Moved

Translator: Nyoi-Bo Studio Editor: Nyoi-Bo Studio

Unfortunately for Xu Que, he did not get the chance to have sex with Su Ling’er that night since he wasn’t able to be alone with her.

After careful consideration, Su Ling’er decided to believe Xu Que. She would go with him to the Imperial City along with the remaining survivors of the Mysterious Clan.

She walked downstairs to the first floor and told everyone the news. However, she did not tell them that Sun Wu Kong was actually Xu Que. Instead, she just told them that Sun Wu Kong could guarantee a peaceful coexistence with the humans in the Imperial City.

Everyone became very excited.

“Living in the Imperial City? How can this be possible?!”

“Although humans have never tried to hunt us or kill us, there is still a great chance that they would kill us if we were to show ourselves to them.”

“Human beings simply don’t like us!”

“Well, I think things might be a bit different now. After all, the whole Fire Nation is under the control of our Shaman Demon King, who is also the leader of the Exploding Heavens Faction. With his authority to protect us, I think we might be able to live peacefully with humans.”

“Yes, I think you’re right.”

Xu Que, who was currently on the third floor, could hear what the Mysterious Clan members were saying downstairs. He then changed into the form of Sun Wu Kong and walked down to the first floor.

He stood in front of everyone and laid out a paper.

“Wo you yi ge meng xiang!” Xu Que read.

Hearing this, everyone was stunned.

What on earth is he speaking? A foreign language?!

“Speak in a language we can all understand! You dead monkey,” Su Xiao Qi said.

“I have a dream that one day this nation will rise up and live out the true meaning of its creed. We hold these truths to be self-evident: that all men are created equal.”

Xu Que had modified the “I Have a Dream” speech to fit the needs of the Mysterious Clan. While this speech was originally created by Martin Luther King Jr. during the Civil Rights Movement in the United States, this speech was very touching and powerful when applied directly to the members of the Mysterious Clan.

The members of the Mysterious Clan were confused and astonished by his words.

What is he saying?! This nation will rise up? What nation? Us? All men are created equal?

He is right! All these years we have been working hard simply to be treated equally! To not be bullied by the Demonic Beasts! To have the same rights as everyone else!

Everyone began to shout.

“Shaman Demon King!”

“Shaman Demon King!”

“Shaman Demon King!”

Hearing this, Xu Que felt very upset and was about to throw the paper away.

Why do they always call me a Dirty Demon King? Can’t they call me a name that sounds better? Besides, am I really a dirty man?

However, there were still some people who had not been persuaded yet.

After all, the Mysterious Clan had been living a life of seclusion in the forest for many years. They were afraid that if they went to the Imperial City without fully preparing for and considering this decision, they may lose their lives. Even if they weren’t killed, they did not want to live as second citizens among the humans.

After these people had expressed their disagreement, Xu Que spoke again.

“It’s up to you. Do what you like,” he said. “For anyone who wants to come with me to the Imperial City, we leave tomorrow. As for those who prefer not to come, you alone will be responsible for what happens to you. I do not care if you get caught by the Demonic Beasts Clan and become their slaves. It’s none of my business. I wish you all good luck.”

He is right. If Sun Wu Kong leaves, we might be attacked again by the Demonic Beasts again…

The people who were originally opposed to the idea decided to change their minds. Thus, everyone now agreed to travel with Sun Wu Kong to the Imperial City. Su Ling’er was surprised at how easily Xu Que had persuaded everyone to agree with his plan.

Everyone began to cheer for Sun Wu Kong.

“Shaman Demon King!”

“Shaman Demon King!”

“Shaman Demon King!”

Xu Que couldn’t bear to be called “Shaman Demon King” any longer. He threw away his paper, turned around, and began to walk toward the stairs.

Seeing this, everyone was shocked.

“My God! We must have deeply moved the Shaman Demon King.”

“He probably never thought we would be able to still stick together after our last battle.”

“The Shaman Demon King must be crying, and he does not want us to see him cry!”

As Xu Que was walking upstairs, he felt the urge to spit out blood.

Crying? Seriously?!

He stomped up the stairs, trying to think of a way to get them to stop calling him Shaman Demon King.

Suddenly, a door in front of him opened.

Xu Que immediately smelled the familiar fragrance of Su Ling’er. She smelled just like a sweet flower.

“Xu Que, are you OK?” Su Ling’er asked. Su Ling’er also thought that Xu Que must be feeling very sad and touched.

I am fine. Why on earth does everyone think I am so emotionally weak?

Su Ling’er gently placed her soft hands on Xu Que’s shoulders.

“When I see everyone shouting your name together, I, too, am deeply moved by the scene. You can cry if you want, I won’t mind,” she said gently.

F*ck! I am not moved at all! I am feeling angry! OK!

“Don’t worry, no one will disturb us here. No one else will see you.”

Xu Que’s eyes sparkled. If this was true, then he was finally alone with Su Ling’er! He turned around to face her, his eyes rolling with tears.

Su Ling’er was surprised. She had never seen Xu Que cry before. She never thought a man as powerful as Xu Que could also cry like a child. This made her feel rather sad. Su Ling’er silently hugged Xu Que and patted him on the back.

“I am really touched by them! I really am!” Xu Que said through his tears.

I am such a good actor! Haha!

Xu Que did not feel any shame at all for faking all this.

Can I just have sex with her already? She admires me so much! Besides, I have already conquered her!

Xu Que continued to touch her body…

At last, his head was on her long, slim, snow-white legs…

Su Ling’er thought that he was probably just tired wanted to fall asleep in her lap, so she gently ran her fingers through his hair.

The clothes covering her legs were now very wet, stained by Xu Que’s tears and saliva…

chapters.title: Chapter 498
chapters.body:
Chapter 498

Translator: Nyoi-Bo Studio Editor: Nyoi-Bo Studio

It was the morning two days after the battle against the Demonic Beast Clan. Xu Que woke up only to find that he was lying in bed alone. This filled him with great remorse.

I’m pissed! Last night I fell asleep and did nothing! This is truly pathetic! Not even a lousy animal would have missed a chance like that! Her long and beautiful legs were so comfortable to lie on. I couldn’t help falling asleep!

“Alas!” Xu Que sighed regretfully.

Despite his disappointment, he forced himself up out of bed, opened the door and stepped out of the room. Today he would execute his species rescue plan by leading the Mysterious Clan to the Imperial City. It would be a piece of cake.

Thanks to Su Ling’er’s leadership, the Mysterious Clan members were gathered together on the first floor were fully prepared for their departure. They had been waiting and ready to go for a long time now.

When Xu Que came downstairs, all people of the Mysterious Clan shouted.

“Shaman Demon King!”

This made Xu Que want to run away crying, for their cheers of “Shaman Demon King” reminded him of the wonderful opportunity last night that he let slip through his fingers.

Su Ling’er walked up to Xu Que with a smile.

“Did you sleep well last night?” she asked softly.

“No!” Xu Que replied without hesitation.

“Why?” she asked in surprise. Last night, she had left after confirming that Xu Que was asleep. She had felt relieved that Xu Que was sleeping soundly after such a long couple of days.

“I am afraid of the dark, and dare not sleep alone!” Xu Que said.

“Ha ha ha ha!” Su Xiao Qi laughed. “Shame on you! I started to sleep alone when I was 13!” she said disdainfully.

“You are really brave,” Xu Que said, embarrassed.

“That’s for sure!” Su Xiao Qi said. She then walked away proudly with her head high and her chest out, like a little rooster who had just won a fight.

Su Ling’er’s face was flushed. She was beginning to realize what Xu Que meant. He said he dared not sleep alone. Did that mean he wanted to sleep with her?

This guy is really naughty! He is always saying something frivolous!

Trying to move past the thought of the missed opportunity last night, Xu Que decided that it was about the time to set off. He turned to Su Ling’er and began to speak.

“Ling’er, we could…”

“No, I can’t, I… I am still not ready for that!”

Su Ling’er left in a hurry, her face completely red.

Xu Que was dumbfounded.

You really don’t need to say it in such a bashful way! What the h*ll? Someone might misunderstand and think that I was asking her to sleep with me! This world is so dirty! How is a pure and innocent person like me to survive in this world?

Xu Que sighed wistfully and looked at the sky, raising his head at 45-degree angle.

Suddenly, a Mysterious Clan guard rushed into the tower.

“Report!” said the guard. “Your majesty, we found a suspicious dog outside the city. It must be a spy of the Demonic Beasts Clan!”

“A dog?” Xu Que was shocked until he realized that Buttface was lost.

During the battle, Xu Que asked Su Ling’er if she would like to eat dog meat, so Buttface was frightened away. If the guard hadn’t reported about this, he would have forgotten about Buttface altogether.

“It’s OK! That’s my pet dog. You can call him Buttface,” Xu Que consoled.

“Your majesty, when we found the dog, he began shouting about wanting to have a duel with us,” the Mysterious Clan guard replied.

“Something is wrong with his head,” Xu Que said, waving his hand. “Just ignore him. We should get going. Brace yourself and let’s set off!”

“Yes, sir!” the people of the Mysterious Clan replied.

…

Outside the Imperial City of the Fire Nation, the sun was setting in the west. The evening wind carried on it the fragrance of the plentiful flowers.

With the help of Teleportation Spells, Xu Que, Buttface, and the dozens of Mysterious Clan members had arrived at the gates of the Imperial City in just three days.

However, the journey there was not the most peaceful. The people of the Mysterious Clan stuck out like a sore thumb. Many times, human beings who passed them by on the road became frightened and ran away from them. There were also a few times when large groups of armed humans drew their swords, preparing to attack them.

Xu Que had summoned his Thunder Illusion Body for this journey so that the Mysterious Clan could be accompanied by a human figure. If anyone questioned them or got in their way, the Thunder Illusion Body would scold them, saying “I am Li Bai of the Exploding Heavens Faction. I am traveling with my friends. How dare you stand in our way!?”

Hearing the names “Exploding Heavens Faction” and “Li Bai,” all the hostile human beings immediately turned around and ran away.

Ever since Xu Que killed the Emperor of the Fire Nation as well as the Old God of Killing of Tian Sha, the people of the Fire Nation trembled with fear upon hearing the name of the Exploding Heavens Faction and didn’t dare to offend them.

Before Xu Que had even arrived at the Imperial City, the news of Li Bai’s travels had stormed the city.

“Did you hear that Lord Li Bai of the Exploding Heavens Faction is back?”

“Of course. I heard that he came back with some half-human-half-demon Mysterious Clan people! I don’t know what he is up to.”

“Could it be that he is going to attack the Imperial City?”

“Are you insane? The Imperial City is under the control of the Exploding Heavens Faction!”

“Right! Although Madam Ya is the ruler of the Imperial City, everyone knows Madam Ya is the woman of Lord Li Bai!”

“When Xu Que left, he said that anyone who bullies Madam Ya will be punished by the Exploding Heavens Faction!”

“Holy sh*t! Something must be very wrong then. Several days ago, I heard that some young people were talking about Madam Ya in the hotel. One of them even said he wanted to sleep with Madam Ya!”

“I heard about that too. Those young people have very powerful and mysterious backgrounds!”

“I guess they are from overseas. If they were from the Five Nations, they wouldn’t dare to disregard the Exploding Heavens Faction!”

“It seems like the Imperial City won’t stay peaceful for much longer!”

…

Meanwhile, in the Imperial Palace of the Fire Nation…

Madam Ya was sitting in one of the wings of the palace. She was cradling a portrait and staring at it intently.

The portrait displayed a graceful young man dressed in white. He was leaning on a door frame and looking at the sky, his head raised at 45-degree angle. He held a cigarette in his hand. He was so handsome and stylish.

Beside the portrait, there were two lines of verse – Grip the sun and moon and pick the stars. There is no person like me in this world.

“Alas!” Madam Ya sighed. Her face was filled with grief and sorrow.

Lord Li Bai, whom she adored, had left the Imperial City over a year ago. She knew that Li Bai and Xu Que were the same person. In fact, most people in the Imperial City knew this. Only a small group of people in the city still believed Li Bai and Xu Que were different people.

One of the traits that Xu Que and Li Bai had in common was the habit of saying dirty words. However, Li Bai was quite different in Madam Ya’s eyes. Although Li Bai was arrogant and aloof, his literary talent was remarkable.

Ding Dong!

Someone was at the door. Madam Ya opened the door to find a kneeling maidservant.

“Madam, those young people have come back again,” the maidservant said anxiously. “They…they said this is their last warning!”

“Hmph! I will not meet with them!” Madam Ya snorted as she put down the portrait.

“But…but, Madam, our scout reported that these people have unfathomable backgrounds. It is said that they come from overseas and that they are quite powerful!” the maidservant said.

“So what? When they arrived at the Imperial City, I received them with kindness. But they have been so outrageous, making those impertinent remarks. I know what they want. I’d rather die than compromise!” Madam Ya snorted, releasing a pressure from her body. Apparently, she was angry.

“Yes, of course,” The maidservant said in surprise. She then left in a hurry.

After a short while, someone came to the door again.

Ding Dong!

Madam Ya furrowed her eyebrows. She opened the door.

“Now what?” she said discontentedly.

However, this time a different servant was kneeling outside the door.

“Madam, Lord…Li Bai is back!”

chapters.title: Chapter 506 - We Are The Wives Of The Faction Leader!
chapters.body:
Chapter 506 - We Are The Wives Of The Faction Leader!

Chapter 506: We Are the Wives of the Faction Leader!

Translator: Nyoi-Bo Studio Editor: Nyoi-Bo Studio

Bleck!

Hearing Xu Que’s suggestion, everyone almost spat blood!

D*mn! What do you mean?

We have been waiting for such a long time. Finally, your first dish is ready. How could you say that the feast is canceled and change it into a f*cking table tennis match?

This God of Cookery is really unreliable!

“Growl! Don’t cross the line!” Buttface shouted frantically. “Drop that thing and serve the dish now! I’m ravenous!”

“Snicker! Lord Li, is every member of the Exploding Heavens Faction so interesting?” asked Madam Ya with a smile. She was leaning on the Thunder Illusion Body.

“You give us too much credit. I will say that despite the ugly appearance, those beef balls are very delicious!” the Li Bai replied with a smile.

“Delicious? Really?” Madam Ya asked, stunned.

Hearing the words of the Thunder Illusion Body, the rest people couldn’t help twitching the corners of their mouths.

Are you kidding?

How could such a thing be delicious?

Alas, it seems the food for members of the Exploding Heavens Faction is just so-so!

“Well,” Xu Que began, “since none of you are interested in a table tennis match, then let’s eat. Now, distribute the beef balls. Remember, one can only have two beef balls at most!”

Everyone was stunned.

Each person can have only two beef balls?

You are kidding us, right?

Heck, one is surely not enough for us! We are only allowed to have two?

To show respect to Sun Wu Kong, many people of the Mysterious Clan didn’t say anything. However, they couldn’t help showing dislike in their faces.

“One person only gets two beef balls? Who wants them? I will not eat them!” Su Xiao Qi said disdainfully, sticking out her tongue.

“Xiao Qi, stop acting mischievously,” Su Ling’er said, patting her sister’s head.

The maidservants began to distribute the food. Soon, everyone received two beef balls. Everyone stared at the two ugly beef balls in their hot soup. No one wanted to eat first.

However, Buttface couldn’t resist the temptation. He threw one beef ball directly into his mouth. He was shocked.

Growl…

Buttface’s growling resounded in all directions. Everyone turned to look at him in surprise.

What’s going on?

Why is he screaming?

Could it be that he was poisoned by the food?

“Holy sh t! This is too delicious! D mn! It…it is marvelous! I feel like I am becoming a celestial!” Buttface said in amazement.

He immediately threw the second beef ball into his mouth. Then he closed his eyes, savoring the taste.

Everyone was stunned.

What? Is it really that delicious?

Curious, everyone else picked up a beef ball with their wooden chopsticks and put it into their mouths, biting down on the beef ball slowly.

Snap!

The hot flecks of meat were bursting with flavor. Their mouths—no; their whole bodies were filled with the delicious taste. Everyone was trembling slightly. It was as if they were all enjoying a full body massage!

“My God!”

“This is way too delicious!”

“I can’t believe such a delicious food could even exist in this world!”

“Wow! It felt like I was a newborn being hugged by my parents for the first time!”

“Really? For me, it felt like when I was in love with my wife! Those were some good years…”

“It’s strange. As I ate it, I felt the same way I did on my wedding night… No, wait… That came out wrong!”

When Madam Ya ate her first beef ball, she trembled and collapsed into the arms of the Thunder Illusion Body. Her face was flushed. Her gaze was full of desire. Was Madam Ya horny?

“Madam, what’s wrong with you?” the Thunder Illusion Body asked hurriedly.

Madam Ya sat up and shook her head. She was flushed with shame and closed her legs tightly.

“No…nothing! The beef ball is very delicious!”

“It is more than delicious! It even strengthens your Soul Strength! If you check your Soul Strength, you will find that it has been increased remarkably!” the Thunder Illusion Body said.

People started to check their Soul Strength. They were totally shocked.

“It’s for real!”

“My Soul Strength has been remarkably strengthened!”

“My gosh! How could such a marvelous thing exist in this world?”

“Sh*t! I have eaten up the two beef balls, but they are far from enough! I’m addicted!”

“God of Cookery, could I have more?”

“Yeah, just give me several bowls more!”

Everyone’s attitudes toward the beef balls had suddenly changed. They looked at Xu Que eagerly. However, Xu Que just shook his head coldly.

“No, each person can only have two beef balls!” Xu Que said.

“Why?” people asked ruefully.

“I don’t need to tell you why! What I say goes! Although a ham is missing in the middle, two is still the best portion number,” Xu Que replied. His answer didn’t make much sense, but that was the best they were going to get out of him.

“No, I need more!” Su Xiao Qi said.

“No way!” Xu Que said, directly refusing her.

“Hum! If you refuse me, I will tell your Faction Leader to punish you! I know that d*mned monkey very well,” Su Xiao Qi said proudly.

“Oh, really?” Xu Que said with a smile. “He has mentioned Su Ling’er to me, but he has never mentioned you.”

“What?” Su Xiao Qi said, her eyes wide. She clenched her teeth. “I don’t care! Anyway, I know him very well, so you need to give me more beef balls!”

“Then what is the relationship between you and the Faction Leader?” Xu Que said with a smile, deliberately teasing her.

In her anger, Su Xiao Qi put her hands on her hips and shouted at Xu Que.

“Both my sister and I are his women! Therefore, you should call me and my sister Boss Ladies of the faction!”

Wow!

Everyone was dumbfounded.

Most of the guests at the feast were members of the Mysterious Clan. These people were especially stunned at Su Xiao Qi’s words.

Su Ling’er’s eyes widened as she became flushed. She dragged Su Xiao Qi away to speak to her.

“Xiao Qi, stop talking nonsense!” Su Ling’er said.

“Why? Didn’t you say…”

“Shut up!”

This little piece of dialogue continued to shock everyone.

Could…this be real?

Are Su Ling’er and Su Xiao Qi women of the Shaman Demon King?

“My Gosh! This is awesome!” a person of the Mysterious Clan exclaimed ecstatically.

Some elders of the Mysterious Clan also nodded. Then they looked at Su Ling’er and smiled.

“Good job kid! Well done!”

“No…it’s not what you think! Don’t listen to Su Xiao Qi’s careless words!” Su Ling’er said. She felt so anxious, shy, and embarrassed. She wished she could just dig a hole in the ground and hide in it.

However, people of the Mysterious Clan wouldn’t listen to any explanation that she gave. They just looked at Su Ling’er with smiles that all seemed to say “I understand.”

It was definitely advantageous for the Mysterious Clan to have Su Xiao Qi and Su Ling’er be Sun Wu Kong’s wives. After all, since Sun Wu Kong was the Faction Leader of the Exploding Heavens Faction, no one would dare to bully the Mysterious Clan ever again!

Xu Que gave several dry coughs.

“Ahem, if this is the case, then fine. You can take the rest of the beef balls,” Xu Que said.

( Updated by AllNovel )

Even though his face didn’t show it, Xu Que was completely shocked! Judging by that short conversation, it seemed like Su Ling’er had spoken to Su Xiao Qi about the possibility of becoming his wife before!

My Gosh! Marrying these two sisters? Ahem, no. As an upright and honest tough-acting king, I will do it in the future… Exactly! I will just do it in the future!

chapters.title: Chapter 513
chapters.body:
Chapter 513

Translator: Nyoi-Bo Studio Editor: Nyoi-Bo Studio

Bang!

A sonic boom was heard as Xu Que flew toward the ground, breaking the sound barrier. Green, white, and black flames surrounded him. The flames twisted through the air and became intertwined as he continued to descend.

Everyone felt the magnificent power of the fire. Some people in the crowd were so awestruck that they felt like they should be kneeling down in reverence.

The Geoduck was in a daze. He then shook his head and shouted up at the sky.

“You are just a cook! How dare you be so arrogant in front of me! You are just putting on a show. Do you really expect me to believe all this?! Go to h*ll!”

Earlier, Xu Que had summoned a sword that had been temporarily enhanced to be at the same power level as a Celestial Artifact. However, this enhancement only lasted for less than a minute because the Sword Spirit inside the weapon absorbed all of the Heavenly Qi. Because the enhancement didn’t work out in Xu Que’s favor, the Geoduck believed that Xu Que was simply putting on a show.

The Geoduck jumped up and flew towards Xu Que like a missile. Although the Geoduck still believed that Xu Que was just putting on a show, he decided he’d better play it safe. Thus, the Geoduck caused the water vapor in the air to condense into liquid, covering himself in a thick layer of water. The Geoduck now looked like a flying water dragon.

Xu Que was gradually gathering the fire that was surrounding him to rest in his palm. Now that he had learned the Genuine Buddha’s Fiery Lotus, he no longer needed to use his hands to control the flames. He could now easily control the fiery lotus with his mind.

Unfortunately, using his mind to gather up the flames wasn’t any faster. However, since his hands were free, he had a greater capacity to act tough. Soon, a beautiful three-colored fiery lotus formed in his right palm.

The two powerhouses continued to speed toward each other. This was a battle between water and fire.

Everyone held their breath. The Geoduck was too powerful. They were afraid that the God of Cookery would be killed.

Even Hero Li Bai has been killed. I don’t think the God of Cookery can win…

“Whatever you’re up to, know that your days are numbered!” the Geoduck laughed.

Xu Que remained calm as he flew downward, the three-colored fiery lotus burning in his right palm.

There was now only ten miles between them.

Whoosh!

Suddenly, Xu Que turned on a dime. He was now flying upward at the speed of lightning.

Everyone was stunned.

What’s going on? Is the God of Cookery too afraid to fight?

“This can’t be! Is it over? Are we going to die?”

“How can he just run away like this?”

“I think we’d better way too! Without our Shaman Demon King, we’re toast!”

“Wait! Something’s not right. Where is the fiery lotus? It is gone!”

“Yes! It’s gone!”

Seeing Xu Que fly up into the sky away from him, the Geoduck began to laugh.

“I knew it! He was just putting on a show. Well, it’s too late to run away. You–”

Before the Geoduck finished his words, the beautiful, three-colored fiery lotus suddenly appeared right in front of his face.

The System had warned Xu Que that the power of the Genuine Buddha’s Fiery Lotus was very magnificent and that he must be careful when using it. Thus, he had waited until the Geoduck was close enough so he could throw the fiery lotus at him. This way, Xu Que wouldn’t get caught in the attack.

Now that the fiery lotus was right in front of him, the Geoduck realized that Xu Que was not just putting on a show. He had never seen anything that had filled him with more terror than this fiery lotus. He could feel Death waving its awful hand before the fiery lotus even touched him.

The Geoduck’s huge body trembled. It tried to escape, but it was already too late.

The lotus began to bloom…

“No!!!” the Geoduck screamed.

Bang!

The fiery lotus bloomed, creating an enormous fire wave. The fire wave spread out in all directions, devouring everything in the surrounding air. The explosion wave spread down to the ground. Even the distant mountains shook.

Everyone in the crowd was literally blown away by the explosion wave, including Su Ling’er, who was in the Infant Transformation Stage.

Countless buildings collapsed and turned into ashes. The entire sky was covered in fire, just like the h*ll depicted in the novel the fiery lotus originated from.

“Ah!…”

The Geoduck was surrounded by the fire. His screams echoed through the air.

He never thought that Xu Que’s fiery lotus could be this powerful. The Spiritual Qi that the fiery lotus emitted was extremely magnificent.

After a long while, the explosion wave finally faded. Everyone managed to get to their feet. The groaning in the air continued.

Everyone was shocked by this scene. No one thought the God of Cookery could be this powerful… What shocked them more was that the Geoduck was still alive.

As the fire gradually faded away, a floating figure came into focus. It was the God of Cookery. His white hair was flowing in the wind as he gradually descended. He put his hands behind his back and stopped his decent in front of the Geoduck.

The Geoduck was covered in blood. Its huge, thick shell had been broken into pieces. It had also been totally baked. Its enormous neck had shrunk substantially.

“You think you can kill me?” Xu Que sneered. “Who do you think you are?! You ugly c*ck-shaped creature!”

Bang!

Xu Que hit the Geoduck with his Dark Heavy Buster Sword. The air around the Dark Heavy Buster Sword rippled…  ( Updated by AllNovel)

The Geoduck fell to the ground. It landed so hard that it made a hole in the spot where it had landed.

It was extremely quiet. No one had expected the God of Cookery to win.

“Remember, I am not only the cook of the Exploding Heavens Faction. I am also one of its nine Patron Saints! They call me the Ultraman Tiga!”

Xu Que took out a red crystal and stuck it on his chest.

Ding! Ding! Ding!

The crystal rang and gave off a red light.

Xu Que raised his head and held up his fists. He stood firmly and jumped upward like a rocket. He became smaller and smaller until he finally disappeared.

Everyone was stunned.

Ultraman Tiga?! Nine Patron Saints? Guardian of the Exploding Heavens Faction?

chapters.title: Chapter 514 - They Are In Your Stomach!
chapters.body:
Chapter 514 - They Are In Your Stomach!

Translator: Nyoi-Bo Studio Editor: Nyoi-Bo Studio

This was the first time people had heard about the Guardian of the Exploding Heavens Faction.

For many of them, this was also the first time hearing about the God of Cookery, let alone the Guardian of the Exploding Heavens Faction!

However, they hadn’t expected this God of Cookery, who was new to them, to have such formidable strength.

At the very beginning, he had still been no match for the Geoduck of the Sea Tribe, and had obviously been in a bad situation. However, in the blink of an eye, he returned with powerful momentum and beat the Geoduck half dead instantly.

Then he left like a secluded expert.

All the people in the area were impressed by this scene and viewed the Exploding Heavens Faction with more reverence.

This faction is so mysterious and fearsome!

No one knew how many powerful experts were in this faction! A formidable powerhouse could have jumped out suddenly to devastate anyone who dared to challenge the Exploding Heavens Faction!

…

At this moment, someone asked with puzzlement, “It’s odd! Why has Lord Li Bai still not been revived?”

“Right! According to the time of his last revival, he should have come back now!”

People started to look around.

Madam Ya was in a daze for a while, then she also started to search for Li Bai anxiously.

At this moment, a beam of light shot over from afar.

Whoosh!

Xu Que reappeared in the name of Li Bai, who was dressed like a scholar, wearing white robes and the Human-skin Mask of Hu Ge.

The purpose of pretending to be Ultraman was to look for a chance to leave and come back in his real body. Now, this seamless connection had finally been realized.

“Look, Lord Li Bai is back!” someone saw Xu Que and shouted immediately.

Madam Ya’s face beamed with delight as she let out a sigh of complete relief.

“It’s strange! Why has he come back from so far away?” someone else asked confusedly.

Hearing this, Xu Que, who had just landed, said with a faint smile, “After a great battle, the Spiritual Qi in this place is too scarce. I moved to another place to reshape my body. Hm? Has the God of Cookery already left?”

“Yes, the God of Cookery just left. He’s so powerful!”

“Then where is the Geoduck?” Xu Que started to show off his acting skills by pretending not to know anything.

“It’s over there!” People immediately pointed at the ruins in the distance.

In the pit, the Geoduck was lying close to death and couldn’t believe what had happened.

Even as a powerhouse, he had been defeated by a cultivator from Five Elements Mountain that he looked down upon. More importantly, this guy was only at Level 4 of the Infant Transformation Stage, which was two levels lower than his cultivation level.

For him, this was totally unacceptable!

However, he felt happy that he was still alive. Instead of killing him, his opponent had just turned around and left.

Therefore, the Geoduck was frantically using his magic arts and trying to recover from his wounds.

At just that moment, a figure appeared at the edge of the pit, staring at him with a smile.

After coming to himself, the Geoduck was greatly shocked and shouted in surprise, “How… could this be possible?”

The one who had appeared at the edge of the pit was Li Bai, who was disguised using Xu Que’s real body.

His face was familiar to the Geoduck.

The Geoduck could remember clearly that the one in front of him had been smashed by him earlier, but this guy had appeared unscratched!

No, this must be a hallucination! A hallucination caused by my severe wound!

The Geoduck was so terrified that he couldn’t believe someone in this world could be resurrected after death.

“What? You’re still not dead? The God of Cookery didn’t boil you! It seems he really disliked your appearance,” Xu Que said suddenly with a smile.

The Geoduck was dumbfounded immediately.

This is not a hallucination!

Sh*t! This guy was really resurrected after death!

“How… could you…” he said with a shaky voice. His wound was so severe that he couldn’t even put a sentence together!

Xu Que replied with a smile, “You want to know why I’m still alive, right? During the daytime, your two mantis shrimp friends also asked this question!”

“W-what? Where are they?” the Geoduck asked angrily, clenching his teeth.

Squinting his eyes, Xu Que took out a beef ball, weighed it in his hand, and then tossed it into the Geoduck’s meat pipe, taking him by surprise.

“What… did you do?” the Geoduck was surprised. However, he was too weak to spit out the beef ball.

However, the next moment, the Geoduck shivered and was totally stunned.

After entering his mouth, the beef ball melted immediately. An extremely delicious, rich aroma filled his body instantly. It was so delicious that he almost called out.

This is so delicious! How could such a delicious thing exist in this world?

Soon, the Geoduck sensed his Soul Strength had abruptly been strengthened, which made him even more terrified.

“What… what’s this?” he asked in surprise. Meanwhile, he was also puzzled why this person would feed him such a delicious food!

“The Juicy Beef Ball of the Exploding Heavens Faction! Is it delicious?” Xu Que replied with a smile.

The Geoduck almost replied, “Yes.” However, he came to himself immediately and said in a low voice, “Don’t get the idea that… I will forgive you after a petty favor!”

At this moment, he was trying to figure out Xu Que and the other’s minds, then came to a conclusion.

He thought the reason that the God of Cookery hadn’t killed him was that the God of Cookery was afraid of the Sea Tribe’s revenge.

Moreover, the man in front of him gave him such magnificent food, which further proved his inference.

Hence, the Geoduck was emboldened again and said impudently, “Where the hell are my two underlings?”

“Oh, parts of them are in your stomach,” Xu Que said while pointing at the Geoduck’s body, for he didn’t know where the stomach of the Geoduck was.

“What do you mean?” The Geoduck was stunned. It seemed he hadn’t figured out what Xu Que meant.

“Alas, I can forgive your ugly appearance, but your low IQ is really unacceptable! The beef ball you ate just now was made of the meat of the mantis shrimps. I chopped them up forty-nine times and made them into shrimp paste, then the paste was solidified through steaming, then I wrapped the solid shrimp paste with beef, then I threw one of them into your stomach, understand?” Xu Que explained patiently.  ( Updated by AllNovel)

The Geoduck was dumbfounded. Then he spat out a strand of fresh blood from his mouth.

“You… you are asking for it!” the Geoduck shouted angrily. Apparently, he was raging like a mad man.

His opponent had killed his two underlings and mercilessly made them into food. Then he had even made him eat the food made out of his underlings, which almost drove him crazy.

“Don’t be angry, anger may ruin your health. Just tell me, where are you from? Where is your home? What do your parents do for a living? Do you have siblings? Does your sister-in-law like dumplings?” With a smile, Xu Que asked these questions gently.

The Geoduck had nearly been driven mad. He couldn’t figure out Xu Que’s intentions, so he asked warily, “What are you going to do?”

With a big smile on his face, Xu Que said, “Nothing, I just plan to call the elder members of your family. Don’t worry, our Exploding Heavens Faction is a principled organization. We guarantee we will not take a single needle or piece of thread from the masses!”
