chapters.title: Chapter 517 - Hard-Working Xu Que
chapters.body:
Chapter 517 - Hard-Working Xu Que

Translator: Nyoi-Bo Studio Editor: Nyoi-Bo Studio

Xu Que and Madame Ya hadn’t seen each other for so long and had finally met. The love between them had bloomed like a flower.

Xu Que had sex with Madame Ya the whole night.

Madame Ya was so satisfied, and so was Xu Que.

“Since you left, I always stood alone in the moonlight, missing you,” Madame Ya complained.

Xu Que smiled and said, “I have good news and a bad news, which do you want to hear first?”

Madame Ya wasn’t a stupid woman. She even guessed what Xu Que was going to say before he said anything.

She hugged Xu Que tightly with her smooth and pale arms and said gently, “Hero Li Bai, I only want to hear good news, only good news!”

What?

Ji Qiu Ya, please don’t be like this. One always chooses to hear the bad news first…

Xu Que forced out a smile and said, “The good news is that I’ll stay here for five more days.”

He had been staying in the Fire Nation for almost half a month, and he would need five more days to set up some powerful Protection Arrays, then he had to go back to the Water Nation to meet the Water Empress.

After the battle with the Sea Tribe, Xu Que realised that the overseas cultivators were extremely powerful. He would have to make good use of his time to enhance his power.

Otherwise, he might not have been able to act tough when he went overseas.

“Five days…” Madame Ya, who was surrounded by Xu Que’s arms murmured.

After a while, Madame asked in a low voice, “Hero Li Bai, take me with you! I want to be with you!”

Xu Que smiled and gently touched her head. “I am going to the other side of the sea, and it is a very dangerous place. I’ll come back and pick you up when I establish my reputation there! I promise! Will you wait for me?”

“Yes!” Madame Ya nodded.

Whatever Xu Que said, Madame Ya would always agree with him, since she was in love with him.

“Hero Li Bai, I have a question, and I want to hear the answer for myself.” Madame Ya suddenly raised up her head and looked at him.

She was being rather serious, but actually looked very cute.

Xu Que smiled. “You wanted to ask me if I am Li Bai or Xu Que, right?”

“Yes! You’re smart indeed!” Madame Ya nodded.

“You aren’t stupid either. Since you already know the answer, why are you bothering to ask me again? Yes, you’re right, Li Bai and Xu Que are the same person.”

“Ah…” Madame Ya sighed.

Xu Que did not understand why Madame Ya sighed. “What happened?”

Madame Ya put her head on his chest and said gently. “I recalled the time we first met! At that time, you were just a little child, pure and naive. How time flies. You’ve become a handsome and talented young gentleman!”

Xu Que was a bit embarrassed and touched his nose.

Madame Ya suddenly raised her head and smiled at Xu Que. “At that time, you weren’t that tall yet, well, I would say you were at the height of my waist. Haha, you were so adorable!”

What’s going on? Is she flirting with me?

Xu Que was a bit surprised and laughed.

All of a sudden, his hands seized Madame Ya’s breasts.

“Ah…” Madame Ya tried to dodge but failed.

“You dare to call me a small child, I shall teach you a lesson today,” Xu Que smiled.

“Hero Li Bai, you’re so energetic! Please don’t!”

“At least seven times!”

“…”

That night, Xu Que finally felt exhausted.

Even a cultivator like him couldn’t have sex all day and all night.

Madame Ya kept begging Xu Que to stop, but when the foreplay started, she began to ask for more.

At last, Madame Ya fell asleep. Xu Que got off the bed and became a bit wobbly while walking.

“System, activate the automatic recovery ability!” Xu Que ordered.

“Ding! The automatic recovery ability has been activated. You have consumed one Acting Tough Point!” the notification sound of the System rang.

Immediately, Xu Que felt something warm running through his body and felt energetic again.

Brilliant!

He was very happy!

How nice this is! I can have as much sex as I want with the help of the System! This is wonderful news for any man.

Xu Que gently opened the door and left Madame Ya’s room.

It was already very dark outside.

All the buildings that had been destroyed before had been rebuilt by the countless guards.

After all, every guard was able to use magic inscription, so it was very easy for them to carry heavy stuff. Besides, there was still a huge amount of money in Madame Ya’s account, so building a new palace was never that difficult.

In fact, when Xu Que came to the Fire Nation, it was simply to set up a few magic arrays to protect the Fire Nation.

He had exchanged two magic arrays at the middle-level from the System and set them up in every corner of the palace. When completed, the entire palace was even harder to invade than the Great Change Sect.

After all, Xu Que had to make some preparations in case the Sea Tribe came here for revenge.

Besides that, Xu Que had made ten more God Powered Cannons and handed them to a few guards who stood by the city walls. He had also set up a middle-level magic array to protect the city walls.

A guard hurriedly came and knelt down on his one knee in front of a general.

“General, we’ve spotted some enemies who are currently ten miles away from us.”

Xu Que had just finished setting up the magic array and frowned when he heard the news.

“Who they are?! How dare they intend to invade us at this moment?”

The guard was surprised to see Xu Que.

“Honourable Hero Li Bai, we have found a demonic beast that is ten miles away from us, we’re guessing it might be a creature from the Sea Tribe.”

“What?! The Sea Tribe has sent people here so soon?” Xu Que frowned.

The guard replied. “I haven’t seen it clearly. It is moving rather slowly.”

“I’ll see who it is!”

Xu Que gathered the True Core Strength around his eyes, and although it was very dark out, he managed to see things that were ten miles away very clearly.

“What?! It’s Buttface!”

Buttface was carrying a huge demonic beast that was few times bigger than itself and heading to the city slowly.

The demonic beast looked very peculiar; it was slippery, rather soft, and had endless tentacles.

Seeing this, Xu Que laughed. “Buttface is bringing me an enormous squid!”

Obviously, the squid was the man they had hunted down earlier before.

“Hero Li, shall we make preparations now?” a guard asked.

Xu Que shook his head. “There’s no need to do so. It’s Buttface, not an enemy.”

Then Xu Que turned around and left.

Xu Que felt like it might be a bit dangerous to meet Buttface at this moment, since he had just ate an aphrodisiac yesterday.

Right at this moment, many people were hanging around the night market at the palace.

Xu Que was about to go back to sleep when he spotted two familiar figures walking in front of him.

They were Su Ling’er and Su Xiao Qi.

Xu Que took off his mask and showed his real face as he walked towards them.

chapters.title: Chapter 518 - Buttface Has Lost His Memory!
chapters.body:
Chapter 518 - Buttface Has Lost His Memory!

Translator: Nyoi-Bo Studio Editor: Nyoi-Bo Studio

“Wow! Look, sister, this looks so delicious!”

“These are sugar-coated berries!”

“I want to try them, I want to eat them!”

“Fine, let me buy some for you!”

…

Su Ling’er and Su Xiaoqi were strolling around the streets. However, their tails were so conspicuous that many passers-by on the street raised eyebrows at them.

However, news had spread in the Imperial City. Everyone knew the people of the Mysterious Clan had been brought there by Xu Que. Therefore, no one dared offend them.

Hence, the two girls were quite happy. After all, they had never had such close contact with human beings, and it was also the first time for them to see such bustling streets.

For them, many snacks and trinkets were extraordinary.

Su Xiaoqi had her wish fulfilled by buying sugar-coated berries. However, after taking a bite, she was not delighted anymore and said, her eyebrows furrowed, “It isn’t as delicious as it looks. It’s sweet, but it can’t match the chocolate pills of that damned monkey!”

“Oh, I think I hear someone praising me,” Xu Que stepped out from behind the two girls and said mischievously.

Hearing his voice, Su Ling’er and Su Xiaoqi turned around immediately.

Su Ling’er was delighted and said, “Sun… Xu Que, you’re back!”

“Yes!” Xu Que nodded his head with a smile.

Su Xiaoqi pursed her lips and snorted, “Bad monkey… no, bad Xu Que, where did you go? Yesterday, we almost got killed!”

“Are you kidding? With the protection of the Exploding Heavens Faction, how could you get killed? I was informed of the things that happened yesterday. Because the God of Cookery was here, it was safe for me to be absent for several days,” Xu Que said with a smile and continued to show off his acting skills.

“Who is that God of Cookery? He’s very powerful!” Su Ling’er asked curiously.

Xu Que smiled and said, shaking his head, “He isn’t very powerful. I could defeat him with only one hand!”

“Boo, you’re boasting and I don’t believe it. Bad Xu Que, just bring me some chocolate!” Su Xiaoqi pouted and reached out her little hand to Xu Que.

Squinting his eyes, Xu Que was about to say something.

At just this moment, a voice came from behind.

“Little brat, little brat, see what I bring back!” the raucous voice of Buttface came from across the street, which attracted the attention of numerous people.

Su Ling’er and Su Xiaoqi turned around, following the voice, then were shocked by what they saw.

Xu Que smiled ruefully. Without looking back, he knew clearly that people’s attention must have been attracted by the big octopus Buttface had brought back.

However, he was quite puzzled since yesterday he had fed Buttface with aphrodisiac. According to Buttface’s temperament, he must have been pissed off.

Unexpectedly, this time, Buttface had overlooked the issue and brought back an Ultimate Octopus delightedly. Something was definitely wrong!

“Little dog, did you kill the other person from the Sea Tribe?” looking at Buttface, Su Xiaoqi asked surprisedly.

Hearing that, Buttface widened his eyes and said angrily, “What’s wrong with you, little fox? I’ve told you so many times that I’m a wolf, not a dog! Moreover, I really don’t need to deal with just one person of the Sea Tribe personally!”

What?

Hearing his words, Xu Que asked in amazement, “Didn’t you kill him?”

He couldn’t believe it at all. Although this one was not as powerful as the Geoduck, it was at least more powerful than those mantis shrimps. If he hadn’t been killed by Buttface, could anyone else in the Five Nations kill this big octopus?

Buttface shook his head and said, “I just fell asleep. When I woke up, I found the body of this Sea Tribe creature not far from me. I guess he was assassinated by someone else.”

“Are you sure you didn’t kill him?” Xu Que asked suspiciously.

Buttface said with absolute certainty, “Of course not! I would never kill such a weakling!”

Su Xiaoqi said immediately, “You’re lying! You already killed one person from the Sea Tribe yesterday!”

“What?” Hearing her words, Buttface was greatly shocked and said in surprise, “How could that be possible? Didn’t I leave first yesterday?”

Hearing that, Xu Que and the two girls were stunned.

What’s wrong with Buttface?

Did he lose memory or is he playing the fool?

Many people had seen Buttface kill a person of the Sea Tribe with a kick yesterday. How could he deny it after only a day?

“Wait! Why are your reactions so weird? Did you do something to me? Just tell me the truth and maybe I can forgive you!” Buttface was anxious and doubtful and said this while staring at Xu Que and the two girls.

It seemed he was not playing the fool at all.

Xu Que was quite confused. He knew Buttface very well. As a dog who liked to be in the limelight, he would definitely take credit and show off for the two Sea Tribe people he had killed. He would never say he hadn’t killed them.

“Could it be a side effect because of my overdosage?” Xu Que murmured confusedly.

Buttface had good ears, so he heard Xu Que’s words. He came over immediately and asked, “Little brat, what do you mean? What the hell did you do to me?”

“Nothing, you just tell me what happened yesterday!” Xu Que patted Buttface’s head and said with a smile.

Buttface suspiciously and warily said, “There’s nothing to say! I didn’t escape deliberately yesterday! I left to call in reinforcements! I didn’t expect to feel drowsy on my way. Then I fell asleep until just now, and now I’m back!”

“That’s all?” Xu Que asked.

“Of course! Did something big happen yesterday?” Buttface asked curiously.

Su Ling’er and Su Xiaoqi were quite surprised. Apparently, now they had also noticed something was wrong with Buttface. It seemed that Buttface had lost some memories and simply forgotten he had killed the Sea Tribe person!

Moreover, according to this circumstance, it seemed this octopus had also been killed by Buttface, but he didn’t remember it.

“Okay, now I see. Well done, I’ll treat you with a big feast tonight.” Xu Que didn’t make a detailed inquiry and just said this while patting Buttface’s head.

Buttface’s eyes were kindled immediately, and he asked in pleasant surprise, “What’s on the menu?”

“Sesame oil, pig skin, Ultimate Octopus, and banana milk! Tell me, is that good?”

“Awesome…” Buttface was so delighted.

…

Finally, Xu Que sent Buttface away and asked him to bring the big octopus into the Imperial Palace. He headed for the Imperial Palace leisurely along with Su Ling’er and Su Xiaoqi.

When Buttface walked away, Su Xiaoqi couldn’t help asking, “What’s going on? Has he really lost his memories?”

“I don’t think he was playing the fool!” Xu Que said, shaking his head.

If Buttface was playing the fool, Xu Que could figure it out easily. However, it seemed Buttface had really forgotten and lost those memories for good.

“It’s so odd! Could it be that he was wounded when he fought with that Sea Tribe person? His wound could have caused his amnesia!” Su Ling’er guessed.

Xu Que shook his head, for that was absolutely impossible!

Buttface’s physique was formidably strong. Even the Geoduck got a fracture after a direct collision with Buttface! How could he be wounded by an Ultimate Octopus?

“Maybe his amnesia was caused by the aphrodisiac.” Xu Que concluded finally.

According to the current situation, this reason was the most plausible. After taking the aphrodisiac, Buttface went crazy. Then he fell asleep and lost the memories.

However, this could also be good news. At least Buttface wouldn’t make trouble about it.

chapters.title: Chapter 521 - Heading To The Water Nation
chapters.body:
Chapter 521 - Heading To The Water Nation

Chapter 521: Heading to the Water Nation

Translator: Nyoi-Bo Studio Editor: Nyoi-Bo Studio

Soon, the day of Xu Que’s departure arrived.  U.p..dated by AllNovel

In the days leading up to it, Xu Que had lived a quite happy life, reading poems and writing couplets with Madame Ya.

Whenever Xu Que had time, he would bring hamburgers, ice cream, and coffee to nourish Madame Ya’s and Su Xiao Qi’s bodies so that the two could become more powerful.

As for Su Ling’er, in the few days since she had taken the Ice Jade Pill, she had been cultivating in her room alone.

Xu Que was becoming a bit impatient and worried about Su Ling’er.

Until the day Xu Que was set to leave, her cultivation was still not over. Su Ling’er was now going through a critical moment for her Spiritual Root.

Later, Xu Que was told that it took at least a month, three to four months at most, for one to “digest” a Ice Jade Pill.

If I had known this earlier, I would have given the Ice Jade Pill to Su Ling’er a long time ago… and the “some other day” she talked about, well, it seems that I can’t wait for that day now.

“What a terribly, terribly sad story…” Xu Que stood outside the door of the palace and sang.

He had already packed and was going to leave.

Su Xiao Qi and Madame Ya had come to see him off, but Buttface wanted to go overseas with Xu Que, so he stole some food from the kitchen and put the food into a bag.

To make things less awkward, Xu Que summoned his thunder illusion body of Hero Li Bai, and he himself changed into the form of Sun Wu Kong.

Su Xiao Qi and Madame Ya were feeling rather sad.

“You dead monkey, once you finish your business, come back! You must come back before the chocolate you gave me runs out!” Su Xiao Qi said.

“Hero Li Bai, I will wait for you until the day you come back.” Madame Ya’s eyes were watering.

Xu Que and Buttface jumped up and got into the teleportation array.

“Goodbye! Wait for me!”

The teleportation array was rotating rather quickly…

Bang!

Xu Que, Buttface, and Hero Li Bai all disappeared.

…

Xu Que and Buttface thought they had only spent about half an hour in the teleportation array, but when they arrived at the Water Nation, they found that it had already been two days.

Buttface hurriedly opened his bag and began to devour the food inside.

Seeing this, Xu Que shook his head and said, “If I were you, I would never eat that pile of crap. You always surprise me!”

“F*ck you! You know what, I brought a huge octopus to the kitchen and intended to ask you to cook it for me. I waited and waited until it began to rot, so it’s all your fault. You’ve indulged yourself with wine and sex for too long!”

Hearing this, Xu Que felt a bit embarrassed. During his time in the Fire Nation, he had been staying with Madame Ya constantly and hadn’t had the time to cook for Buttface.

Even so, he didn’t want Buttface to call him out on this business.

“Oh, really?! You think this is my fault?! Seafood usually rots rather quickly, you have to keep it in an environment with low temperature. Or you can lay it in the sun and dry it, then roast it if you like.”

“Really? Why don’t you tell me earlier?”

“Have I ever lied to you before? Go to the bottom of the sea and kill all of the Sea Tribe, then bring me some seafood, and I will cook it for you.”

“Never mind. I’m on a diet these days, besides, I’m not a foodie!”

Hearing Xu Que suggest he destroy the entire Sea Tribe, Buttface was a bit afraid and immediately made an excuse.

…

They were now on the border between the Water Nation and the Golden Nation. In front of them was a wild and barren land.

Xu Que had been on this road before, but he was still a bit shocked by the scene in front of him.

On the left, it was a land of ice, while on the other side, the mountains were still green, and the river was babbling.

“If I’m right, this is the region of the Snow City. What, are you going to see your old beau?” Buttface asked.

“Old beau? What on earth are you saying?” Xu Que was confused.

“That female General, Situ… Situ Hai Dai!” Buttface said.

“Nonsense! Her name is Situ Hai Tang! Anyway, I haven’t seen her in a while, since the last time I was in the Imperial City.”

“She’s such a marvelous person and a real General on the battlefield. As for you, you’re just a juvenile man who calls himself the head of the Exploding Heavens Faction and cheats people wherever he goes. In a word, she’s too good for you.”

Hearing this, Xu Que was a bit cross and hit Buttface on the head.

Buttface quickly dodged his hit and backed off, thirty feet away. “Young man, I can recall all the magic inscriptions I have ever used in my previous life. You could not possibly hit me.”

“Really?! You can recall what happened in your previous life?” Xu Que was surprised.

“Of course! I’m famous for my perfect memory!” Buttface said proudly.

Xu Que forced out a smile.

You say you’re famous for your perfect memory? For god’s sake, if you have a good memory, how could you forget that I drugged you with an aphrodisiac?

…

Xu Que and Buttface were heading to the Snow City. Xu Que wanted to pay a visit to Situ Hai Tang, as well as the Imperial City.

During the journey, Xu Que tried to find out if Buttface really had a so-called perfect memory of his previous life, but at last, he found that Buttface recalled only one magic inscription he ever used, nothing more.

Finally, they arrived at the Snow City.

It was snowing, and the sun was shining. Against the sunlight, the snowflakes looked extremely beautiful and sparkly. The entire Snow City looked as beautiful as a picture.

At that time, the Snow City was bustling and full of people, just as it was before.

Xu Que and Buttface arrived at the city gates.

“Stop! No demonic beasts are allowed to enter the city.”

…

“What?” both Xu Que and Buttface were stunned.

The two turned around and saw a young man wearing armor standing at the city walls.

Beside him there were many soldiers standing around the young man, and Xu Que knew none of them.

“What happened? Where’s that female General?” Buttface was surprised.

Xu Que frowned.

The Snow City looked just like it had before, but the General who guarded the city walls and all the other soldiers of the Snow City had all been replaced.

What on earth happened?

chapters.title: Chapter 522 - Am I Good Enough To Live Up To Her？
chapters.body:
Chapter 522 - Am I Good Enough To Live Up To Her？

Chapter 522: Am I Good Enough to Live Up to Her？

Translator: Nyoi-Bo Studio Editor: Nyoi-Bo Studio

“Hey, I’m talking to you! Demonic beasts are not allowed to enter the city! If you don’t leave, I’ll show you no mercy!” the man at the city walls shouted again.

Buttface immediately became angry and started to curse, putting his paws on his hips, “Behave yourself! Are you blind? I’m a holy beast! If you don’t believe me, you can come down and I’ll trample you to death with one stomp!”

The young man at the city walls said sullenly, “How dare you! Do you want to start a war with the Snow City?”

“Shut the f*ck up! Don’t waste my time! Who are you? Where is Situ Hai Tang?” Xu Que waved his hands as he asked.

The young man’s eyes became chilly immediately, then he snorted, “Who the hell are you? How dare you call my wife’s name so casually?”

Wife?

Xu Que and Buttface were dumbfounded again.

What’s going on?

We just left for a short period. How could Situ Hai Tang be married?

Sh*t! This is totally unacceptable!

Although Situ Hai Tang is a tomboy, she’s a beautiful girl with a good figure. Most importantly, she’s a tomboy with a strong personality. She’s a girl I used to flirt with, how could she be taken away so carelessly?

Xu Que furrowed his eyebrows, and his face was darkened immediately.

Anyway, the young man was too arrogant. If these words had been spoken in a nicer way, Xu Que would have sighed with regret at most, not gotten angry.

However, this young guy’s impudent words really annoyed Xu Que. If Situ Hai Tang had married a man like him, Xu Que would definitely be unhappy. How could he have been defeated by a man like that?

“Little brat, it’s over. Your old lover got married,” Buttface said, looking at Xu Que helplessly.

Buttface’s hoarse but loud voice was heard by everyone near the city walls.

The soldiers changed their expressions. The young man was even angrier and shouted, “Behave yourself! How dare you discredit my wife! This is a felony! Soldiers, take the two of them down!”

“Yes, sir!”

Immediately, a group of soldiers rushed over from the city walls and surrounded Xu Que and Buttface!

Many cultivators passing by the area stepped back immediately and prepared to watch the fun.

The common people and cultivators in the city were also attracted by what was happening in this area.

A lot of people looked out at them, and someone recognized Xu Que immediately, shouting in surprise, “My gosh! Is that General Zhuge? Look, General Zhuge is back!”

His words astonished many people. These people gushed out of the city.

The soldiers who were surrounding Xu Que and Buttface were shouldered aside by the crowds immediately.

The young man at the city walls and his soldiers were shocked.

“Is he the legendary God of Army General Zhuge? How could this be possible?”

“Sh*t! The rumors are nonsense! General Zhuge looks like a scholar, totally different from the big devil we’ve heard about!”

“Exactly!”

Many soldiers on the city wall started to discuss this in a low voice.

Just at this moment, another group of excited soldiers came out of the city.

“General Zhuge!”

“It really is General Zhuge! Finally, you came back to see us!”

“General Zhuge, I’m Li, do you still remember me?”

“And me! General Zhuge! I’m Lu Benwei!”

These overexcited soldiers came up to Xu Que.

Looking at these familiar faces, Xu Que smiled. Apparently, these were the Snow City soldiers who had used to fight side by side with him.

“General Shang, this is General Zhuge. And the dog beside him is his pet. We are in debt to them!” a Snow City soldier looked up and said to the young man at this moment.

The young man’s face was extremely dreadful and gloomy.

However, before the young man had time to speak, Buttface lost his temper.

“Damn! Li, you’re really bad at talking! I am a wolf, not a pet!” Buttface shouted.

“Stop wasting words! Let’s go into the city first!” Xu Que patted Buttface’s head and stopped him from making trouble.

Then they went into the Snow City with the soldiers.

On the way, many common people and Snow City soldiers came to show their reverence. Little girls presented bouquets to Xu Que, and some old people gave eggs to Xu Que as gifts. The scene was so heart-warming that Xu Que almost wanted to say “Thank you for your eggs, thank you for your bouquets…”

However, the young man at the city walls became more and more jealous.

After being appointed as the Garrison General of the Snow City, he had never enjoyed such reverence from the residents of the city. When he learned this gentle and handsome young man was the legendary General Zhuge, he could do nothing and didn’t dare to challenge Xu Que anymore.

Finally, Xu Que walked into the Snow City along with several of his soldier acquaintances, then they went into a hotel and sat down.

The soldiers wanted to drink tea and exchange conventional greetings with Xu Que. However, Xu Que was quite impatient and said directly, “Let’s get down to business first. Where is your General Situ? I haven’t seen her for a few months, how could she have gotten married?”

The soldiers were stunned, and their smiles also froze slightly.

“What? Something happened during this time?” Seeing the expression of the soldiers, Xu Que couldn’t help frowning.

The soldier whose family name was Li said with a rueful smile, “General Zhuge, actually this issue is a bit complicated. The name of that General Shang is Shang Wu, and he’s the only son of the Sect Leader of the Scarlet Yang Sect. The Sect Leader and General Situ’s father used to be fellow apprentices of the same master. Before General Situ was born, she was betrothed to General Shang through a prenatal betrothal.”

“My God! This is so contrived!” Xu Que was instantly confused. He had thought the young man was the third person. It turned out that he was the third person!  U.p..dated b.y Box novel. com

“Alas! You and General Situ defended the Snow City and took back the Water Nation successfully. Therefore, General Situ was awarded by Her Royal Highness the Water Empress according to her contribution. She was promoted officially as the City Governor. Someone was assigned to take over the position of Garrison General. That General Shang managed to get this position by using his connections. However, General Situ has an aversion to this betrothal, but she also didn’t want to disobey the command of Her Royal Highness. Therefore, she’s been working outside for a long time and seldom comes back,” Li said.

Hearing that, the fire in Xu Que’s eyes was rekindled. “Then they’re still not married now, right?”

“Of course not! I suppose this marriage couldn’t be realized because of General Situ’s personality!” Li said while shaking his head.

Xu Que smiled immediately. The third person is not guilty! The third person can also pursue love! Since Situ Hai Tang wasn’t interested in that General Shang, there’s still a chance for me!

At this moment, Buttface came over and said seriously, “Little brat, to be fair, you couldn’t live up to Situ Hai Tang! However, that Shang Wu is even worse than you! You have to deal with this issue!”

“Sh*t! How dare you say that’s fair! Stop talking nonsense!” Xu Que said angrily, hitting the table.

“No, you can’t say that!” the soldiers nodded. What Buttface had said was extremely outrageous.

Although the soldiers also agreed General Shang couldn’t live up to Situ Hai Tang, at least they had a betrothal. If General Zhuge intervened in this issue, it was no different from stealing someone’s wife!

The next moment, Xu Que continued to say, “Buttface, you’re really too much this time! You’re correct that Shang Wu can’t live up to Situ Hai Tang, but you said I can’t live up to her, which is bullsh*t! Just tell me honestly, am I good enough to live up to Situ Hai Tang?”

chapters.title: Chapter 531 - You Have Broken The Law
chapters.body:
Chapter 531 - You Have Broken The Law

Chapter 531: You Have Broken the Law

Translator: Nyoi-Bo Studio

Editor: Nyoi-Bo Studio

"Oh? Really? Please tell me what I can do." Shang Ling grew interested.

Xu Que smiled. "If you can't do it yourself, I can do it for you, if you don't mind."

"What?!" Shang Ling was stunned.

Xu Que laughed. "Sect Leader Shang, don't worry, I'll have mercy on him. If I do hit him on your behalf, he'll definitely hate me and want revenge, and to beat me, he would have to work hard on his cultivation."

"This…" Shang Ling hesitated.

Xu Que said, "Sect Leader Shang, just think carefully. When he grows extremely powerful, we'll tell him we did this simply because we want the best for him, and he will understand us by that time. How do you feel about this?"

Shang Ling was silent with his hands behind his back, as if he was really considering Xu Que's suggestions.

Buttface was surprised by what Xu Que had said and stared at him.

"Sect Leader Shang, he offended me this time. Thankfully, I am such a nice man that I wouldn't hold grudge against him, but what if he offends someone much more powerful and more cruel than me? He should be taught a lesson this time, otherwise he'll put himself in bigger danger next time."

Shang Ling was silent for a while and finally nodded. "Fine! Do as you have suggested. But please don't be too harsh on him."

"No problem. You can count on me. Sect Leader Shang, just remember that from today on, you owe me a favour," Xu Que laughed.

"Of course, of course. I will definitely remember what you've done for me!" Shang Ling nodded.

"F*ck!" Buttface could no longer see Xu Que tricking Shang Ling and cursed.

How sneaky! He does indeed have a sharp tongue! I never thought he could hoodwink people like this!

Hearing Buttface's shout, Shang Ling was surprised.

"What's wrong with your pet?"

"Don't mind him, there's something wrong with his head. Pay no attention to him please. I will go and find your son, bully him, and make him hate me."

Shang Ling made a bow with his hands folded on his front and said, "I'll count you on for this, thank you!"

…

After learning where Shang Wu was, Xu Que and Buttface quickly went to find him.

"You're really good at tricking people, aren't you! To be honest, I admire you for this!" Buttface gave a thumbs up to Xu Que.

In fact, this was the first time that Buttface had ever praised Xu Que.

"I've told you many times that we need to be modest." Xu Que replied.

"How about this, allow me to punch Shang Wu a few times? Don't worry, I will be merciful," Buttface said with great excitement.

"I will not! What if he is killed by you? Then I am the one who's responsible! Anyway, you can spit on him if you want."

"Deal!"

On the way, the two were talking about how they were going to hit Shang Wu, and after a while, they arrived at a restaurant.

It was early morning, but the restaurant was already full of people.

To relax, Shang Wu had gone to the restaurant with his friends.

Each young man was hugging a few women and laughing hard. Shang Wu was surrounded by many beautiful women wearing heavy makeup. They were drinking and laughing…

I'll tell you, that General Zhuge's days are numbered, and he has no idea about it!"

"Does this mean you've found a way to punish him?" one of the young men asked.

Hearing this, Shang Wu laughed. "Why on earth should I waste my time finding a way to punish someone like him? My aunt has sent people here. When they arrive here, General Zhuge is bound to die."

Bang!

All of a sudden, the door of the restaurant was opened.

Xu Que slowly walked inside and mocked him, "Oh, really? Close the door and release the dog!"

"..."

Everyone present was shocked. They'd had no idea that Xu Que would come here, and with his pet dog, even.

Shang Wu instantly became pretentious and smiled. "My dearest General Zhuge, I was just joking earlier. You don't mind, right? Thanks to you, I've been reprimanded by my father."

Shang Wu had mentioned his father on purpose and thought Xu Que would behave himself with his father currently in the city; on the other hand, he thought his joke was just a small one, and compared to what Xu Que did to him, it was basically nothing.

Xu Que stood still and stared him, smiling, not saying anything.

Buttface was getting rather excited and couldn't wait to hit Shang Wu.

"General Shang, I'm sorry to tell you that today, I've come here to enforce the law!" Xu Que said.

Hearing this, people were confused.

Enforcing the law? What law?

"What do you mean by this? You aren't even an official in this city…"

Shang Wu frowned and realised something wasn't right, he backed off a bit and became rather worried.

Xu Que smiled. "You might have not heard, but I was recruited into a new department called the Urban Administrative and Law Enforcement Bureau, or Urban Management Bureau, to make it simple. I'm in charge of the enforcement of urban management of the city."

"Urban management of the city?" Shang Wu frowned, "Then why you are here?"

"To arrest you," Xu Que said casually.

"What?"

"You've broken the law and you will be punched! Buttface, close the door!" Xu Que said while pulling up his sleeve.

Shang Wu was so frightened that his head was numb. After all, he was only in the Original Infant Stage and couldn't possibly win Xu Que.

"Zhuge Liang, stop! You can't do this to me!"

"Haven't you heard? I'm in charge of the urban management of the city. Look at your face, it's so ugly, and you simply come out on the street without wearing a mask! You have done some severe damage to the public image of our city."

The next minute, Xu Que stood in front of Shang Wu and punched him right in the face.

"Ouch!" Shang Wu shouted with pain. His nasal bone was broken immediately and blood flew down.

Xu Que hit him again and again and again…

"You should have worn a mask!"

"Ouch!"

"You should have worn a mask!"

"Ouch!"

"You should have worn a mask!"

"Ouch!"

...

Everyone present was stunned by what they were seeing.

Someone with an ugly face not wearing a mask is against the law?!

Why I have never heard of this before?!

But General Shang isn't ugly at all!

chapters.title: Chapter 575 - I Have To Show Them How Wonderful I Am
chapters.body:
Chapter 575 - I Have To Show Them How Wonderful I Am

Chapter 575: I Have to Show Them How Wonderful I Am

Translator: Nyoi-Bo Studio

Editor: Nyoi-Bo Studio

Hearing what Xu Que had said, Liu Jingning was stunned.

She wasn't shocked by Xu Que's bragging, but by his overconfidence.

He was so unlucky today, how on earth can he be so sure that he would definitely find something valuable in these stones?

"Xu Que, are you mad?! Do you have any idea what you're saying?" Buttface was surprised.

"Sh*t! You're lying to them again! I won't buy your words anymore! You're Xu Que, not Wang Sicong!"

Hearing this, Xu Que and Liu Jingning looked at each other and smiled.

"You're silly! Wang (王) is the family name of Wang Sicong, so it will still be Wang if you write it upside down!"

Liu Jingning shook her head and smiled.

Buttface was confused, then he shouted, "You're such a scammer! Next time I'm cheated by you, I'll also write my first name upside down."

"Stop talking nonsense! I'm sure all the stones will be good!" Xu Que said as he took out an X-ray machine from the System. It was the size of a man's palm, and with its help, Xu Que could see through a stone, the inside projected onto the screen of the System. Besides, it only cost him one thousand Acting Tough Points a day.

"Little Que Que, I don't think you should waste anymore of your Spiritual Stones. As far as I'm concerned, all the stones here are better than the ones you bought earlier, but still, there are some bad ones. Also, the stones here are much more expensive. I'm sure you can get something nice from them, but I'm also sure that what you get from the stones will be far less than what you will have spent."

Liu Jingning shook her head and felt rather worried.

After all, it wasn't clear if Xu Que would be unlucky again.

Xu Que was very calm and smiled. "You'll see! Buttface, follow me and play some BGM!"

"What? What did you just say?" Buttface was confused.

"BGM! Background music! Come, take this radio and play the song 'God of Gamblers'!" Xu Que said and directly gave Buttface a boombox that he had bought from the System.

Buttface was stunned and excited to see the boombox. He had never seen such a thing and was ready to chew on it.

Seeing this, Xu Que shouted, "You idiot! It's not edible! Now press that red button, I need to show them how wonderful I am!"

"You mean this thing can play music?!" Buttface grew curious.

So did Liu Jingning.

Xu Que smiled. "You're full of questions, aren't you? Be patient; you'll see how it works soon!"

…

At the same time, at the huge yard behind the arched doors…

The whole yard was as big as two football stadiums and surrounded by walls made of bricks.

In the center, there was a pond upon which tens of ancient pavilions in traditional Chinese style had been built.

Each one of the pavilions was a figure of great importance and represented an influential family.

Around the pavilions, there were many beautiful flowers and plants. Green mountains could be seen, and the murmuring of running water could be heard, as well.

Some scholars were playing the zither on the other side of the pond, and the sound of it could also be heard from time to time.

The atmosphere was tranquil and elegant.

In one of the many pavilions, there were a few old men in the Void Training Stage chatting happily.

"How nice this place is! The stone-cutting convention, under the cooperation of the Jiang family and the Gong family, is going to be a great success."

"To my surprise, apart from our Eight Directions Green Dragon Sect, the other three sects are also here, and the big three families in the Eastern Continent have sent many people here as well."

"Both the Jiang and the Gong families are bound to make a fortune from this convention. They've dug out many ancient stones from the Heaven Dragon Cave, and you know, everyone in the Eastern Continent will want to have a look at them!"

"The Heaven Dragon Cave is such a dangerous place, it seems that they took the stones from the outskirts, but still, to retrieve the stones, many powerful men in the two families were sacrificed."

"I'm so glad that Elder Qin is also here today. I'm sure you can find many treasures in these stones."

"Stop talking nonsense! We should not underestimate people from other influential families and factions!"

The old men were talking happily with each other while enjoying the beautiful sound of the flute and voices.

All of a sudden, the void at the entrance began to ripple.

The next minute, two shadows quickly passed through the entrance, accompanied by pop music that was echoing throughout the whole yard.

"Dong! Dong! Dong! Dong!"

…

Everyone looked at the entrance and saw a handsome young man and a dog wearing black cloaks.

Both of them walked slowly and proudly into the yard.

Buttface was carrying the boombox on his shoulder and walking like a human. He looked extremely arrogant and cold.

Xu Que had the same hairstyle as Chow Yun-fat, and he had a jade ring on his hand. He was walking slowly while smiling and gently waving his hand, as if he was being welcomed by his fans.

Everyone was stunned by what they saw, but somehow, they all felt that the two looked rather cool.

Those who knew anything about music were terribly moved by the rhythm of the song, for they had never heard of this sort of music before and found it to be magnificent.

"Stop!" Xu Que suddenly said.

Buttface quickly turned off the music.

People were all drawn in by the boombox and looked at it curiously.

"Hello, everyone! I'm Chow Yun-fat, it's the first time for me to be here. If I've said or done anything wrong, come and f*cking hit me!"

What?!

Upon hearing this, everyone was shocked.

No one present responded to Xu Que. After all, they had all come from either a big family or an influential faction, so it would be very disgraceful for them to reply to such a reckless young man.

Still, some of the young men present looked at Xu Que coldly and sneered.

The next minute, Liu Jingning came.

Earlier, when Xu Que had told her he wanted to come into the yard looking like Chow Yun-fat with a boombox, she had decided not to go in along with Xu Que, since she thought it would be mortifying.

Seeing others' facial expressions, Liu Jingning immediately knew Xu Que had gotten himself into trouble again.

Liu Jingning sent a voice message to Xu Que.

"Little Que Que, can't you behave yourself for even a minute?!"

Xu Que stared at Liu Jingning and said, "Nonsense! I haven't gotten myself into any trouble, I was simply giving them a great show!"

…

At this moment, a young girl wearing an extravagant costume came forward and smiled.

"The stone-cutting convention is about to start, please follow me!"

"Thank you!" Xu Que answered politely.

Led by the young girl, Xu Que, Liu Jingning, and Buttface were walking to a pavillion at the edge of the yard.

According to the rules of the stone-cutting convention, someone who was in the Infant Transformation Stage or from an ordinary family had to sit in the pavillion that was in the yard together with three other people.

When the three arrived at the pavillion, they found there was already a young man and a young woman sitting there. Both of them were in the Infant Transformation Stage and were elites.

When they saw Xu Que, their faces immediately became gloomy.

The young woman angrily scolded the young girl.

"Wait! Are you mad! Why on earth did you bring these people here?! I can't possibly share the same pavilion as them!"

After hearing this, the young girl was embarrassed.

At this moment, there weren't many pavillions on the edge of the yard, and most of the pavilions were occupied by three people, or even five.

There had only been one pavilion that could accommodate Xu Que, Liu Jingning, and Buttface.

"Miss Li, I'm sorry…"

"Shut up! Although my family is not one of great importance, still, I can't possibly sit with these people! That's that!"

Hearing this, Liu Jingning and Buttface looked at Xu Que and thought this was happening because of Xu Que's bad fortune.

Xu Que wasn't angry at all. Instead, he smiled at the young girl and said, "Don't worry, I'm going to stay here and no one can ask me to leave! By the way, bring me some eels if you have any here—two will do."
